3. Stir and immediately add one bottle of water, salt, pepper, nutmeg, one cut onion and some artichoke bottoms and the fried chickens.

title: Frangos Refogados com Chuchú (Chicken Braised with Chayote)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- two spoons of fat
- chayotes, peeled and chopped
- one bowl of water
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- two egg yolks
- two spoons of vinegar

## Directions

1. Braise the chicken pieces in two spoons of fat, turning them to brown on both sides; remove them
2. In the same fat, braise a portion of peeled and chopped chayotes
3. Add one bowl of water and the chicken pieces
4. Season with salt, parsley, and onion leaves
5. Cook until done
6. Before serving, thicken with two egg yolks beaten with two spoons of vinegar and serve

title: Frangos Refogados com Repolho (Stewed Chicken with Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- two handfuls of bread crumb moistened with milk
- three dozen sapucaia nuts crushed
- spoonful of sugar
- one pound of lamb chopped
- salt
- onion
- two chickens
- fat
- hard cabbage
- water
- onion leaves
- eight egg yolks

## Directions

1. Knead two handfuls of bread crumb moistened with milk, three dozen crushed sapucaia nuts, a spoonful of sugar, one pound of chopped lamb, salt and an onion
2. Fill two chickens with this mixture
3. Brown them in abundant fat, turning them until they are golden
4. Add a hard cabbage cut into four pieces, water, salt and as many onion leaves as necessary
5. Let them boil
6. When cooked, place the chickens on a plate with the cabbage around and pour eight egg yolks on top
7. Put in the oven and serve

title: Frangos à Italiana (Chicken Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- two young chickens, cut into pieces
- wheat flour
- lemon juice
- sweet olive oil
- salt
- bay leaves
- pepper
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Cut the chickens into pieces and coat with wheat flour
2. Soak in a mixture of lemon juice, sweet olive oil, salt, bay leaves, and pepper
3. When flavored, remove and dry the pieces
4. Pass through grated cheese
5. Fry in butter and serve

title: Frangos à Parmesão (Chicken Parmesan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut into four pieces
- butter
- one cup of white wine
- three egg yolks
- salt
- nutmeg
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Braise the chicken pieces over coals in one spoon of butter with one cup of white wine
2. Season with the yolk of three eggs, salt, and nutmeg
3. When cooked, place on a plate
4. Cover everything with a layer of grated cheese
5. Return to the oven until browned and serve

title: Fressura de Vitella com Carapicú (Calf's Offal with Carapicú)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf offal
- water
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- one onion
- two tablespoons wheat flour
- same amount of butter
- one cup broth

## Directions

1. Boil the offal after washing it in water and salt
2. Add pepper, parsley and one onion
3. When almost cooked, add two tablespoons of wheat flour mixed with the same amount of butter, dissolved in one cup of broth
4. Let it boil for half an hour and serve with cornmeal mush or porridge

title: Fressura de Vitella com Carapicú (Veal Offal with Carapicú)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal offal
- water
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- one onion
- two tablespoons wheat flour
- same amount of butter
- one cup broth
- cornmeal mush or fish paste for serving

## Directions

1. Boil the cleaned offal in water and salt
2. Add pepper, parsley, and one onion
3. When nearly cooked, add two tablespoons wheat flour mixed with an equal amount of butter, dissolved in one cup of broth
4. Let boil for half an hour
5. Serve with cornmeal mush or fish paste

title: Fressura Ensopada (Stewed Calf's Offal)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- two onions
- one calf offal
- one glass of wine
- one glass of water
- salt
- onion
- clove
- nutmeg
- lemon juice
- one tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Fry a little butter and two cut onions with one washed calf offal
2. Scald the offal and cut it
3. After fifteen minutes, add one glass of wine, one of water, salt, onion, clove, nutmeg, lemon juice and one tablespoon of sugar

title: Fressura Ensopada (Stewed Veal Offal)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- two onions
- veal offal, cleaned
- one glass wine
- one glass water
- salt
- onion
- cloves
- nutmeg
- lemon juice
- one tablespoon sugar
- ora-pro-nobis leaves

## Directions

1. Fry a little butter with two sliced onions and cleaned veal offal
2. Scald the offal and cut it
3. After fifteen minutes, add one glass wine, one glass water, salt, onion, cloves, nutmeg, lemon juice, one tablespoon sugar, and ora-pro-nobis leaves
4. Let boil over coals for two hours
5. Serve

title: Fressura Envinagrada (Pickled Veal Offal)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal offal
- water
- salt
- pepper
- onions
- cloves
- one cup vinegar
- mustard sauce

## Directions

1. Cook the cleaned and scalded offal in water and salt
2. Add pepper, onions, cloves, and one cup vinegar
3. Let boil for three to four hours
4. Serve with a spicy and sour mustard sauce

title: Fricandó de Carne de Vitella (Fricandeau of Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal meat, preferably the glands
- hot water
- meat broth
- pieces of salt pork
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- onions

## Directions

1. Cut the veal meat, preferably the glands, into small pieces
2. Scald in hot water and let it cool
3. Place in a casserole with meat broth, some pieces of salt pork, salt, pepper, parsley and onions
4. Place the well-covered pot over coals and also put coals on top
5. Let it cook and serve with well-cooked sorrel or with some of the sauces for meat

title: Fricassé de Capão com Giló (Capon Fricassee with Giló)
body:
## Ingredients

- one capon roasted on a spit
- two pounds of roasted mutton
- two spoons of wheat flour, toasted
- two spoons of butter
- one cup of broth
- one cup of red wine
- nutmeg
- one dozen giló fruits

## Directions

1. Take one roasted capon and two pounds of roasted mutton; cut into pieces
2. Make a sauce with two spoons of wheat flour toasted in two spoons of butter, and add one cup of broth and one cup of red wine
3. Add the chopped meat with a little nutmeg
4. When cooked, place around the plate one dozen giló fruits, boiled in water and salt

title: Fricassé de Capão com Giló (Fricassee of Roasted Capon with Okra)
body:
## Ingredients

- one capon roasted on a spit
- two pounds of roasted mutton meat
- two tablespoons of wheat flour toasted in butter
- one chicara of broth
- one chicara of red wine
- nutmeg
- one dozen okras
- water
- salt

## Directions

1. Take one capon roasted on a spit and two pounds of roasted mutton meat
2. Cut into pieces
3. Make a sauce from two tablespoons of wheat flour toasted in an equal amount of butter
4. Add one chicara of broth and one chicara of red wine to the flour mixture
5. Add the minced meat with a little nutmeg
6. When cooked, arrange around the plate one dozen okras that have been boiled in water and salt

title: Fricassé de Capão à Caçador (Hunter-Style Capon Fricassee)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat from one capon roasted on a spit
- two pounds of roasted wild pork meat
- one tablespoon of butter
- nutmeg
- pepper
- onion
- one tablespoon of vinegar
- two chicaras of red wine
- one glass of cognac
- one tablespoon of honey
- two egg yolks

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from one capon roasted on a spit and cut into pieces the size of a walnut
2. Do the same with two pounds of roasted wild pork meat
3. Melt one tablespoon of butter with grated nutmeg, a pinch of ground pepper, and chopped onion
4. Add the meat and stir
5. Add one tablespoon of vinegar, two chicaras of red wine, one glass of cognac, one tablespoon of honey, and two beaten egg yolks
6. Simmer for a quarter hour and serve

title: Fried Eggs Hotel Style (Ovos Fritos à Moda de Hotel)
body:
## Ingredients

- six to eight eggs
- salt
- chopped chive leaves
- ground pepper
- one spoon of butter

## Directions

1. Break six to eight eggs into a bowl
2. Beat them with a little ground salt, chopped chive leaves and a little ground pepper
3. Melt one spoon of cow butter in a frying pan
4. When melted and still not very hot, pour in the eggs, continuing to stir so they don't stick to the bottom
5. When fried, serve

title: Fried Eggs in Strips (Ovos Fritos em Tiras)
body:
## Ingredients

- eight egg yolks
- a little brandy
- salt
- peppers
- sardines
- little fat
- chopped salad

## Directions

1. Beat eight egg yolks with a little brandy, a little salt and peppers
2. Pour into a pan over coals until hardened; then cut into strips the thickness of a finger
3. Place these strips interspersed with sardines in a pan with little fat; let heat, and serve with chopped salad

title: Fried Eggs with Bacon (Ovos Fritos com Toucinho)
body:
## Ingredients

- one slice of lean bacon with some meat
- pepper
- six beaten eggs
- one spoon of vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry one slice of lean bacon with some meat, add a little pepper, and when well browned, pour in six beaten eggs mixed with one spoon of vinegar
2. Let finish frying, place on a plate, and serve

title: Fried Eggs with Herbs (Ovos Fritos com Hervas)
body:
## Ingredients

- six eggs
- salt
- parsley
- borage leaves
- one spoon of fat
- one chopped onion
- ground pepper

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs with a little salt, parsley and chopped borage leaves
2. In another pan, melt one spoon of fat with one chopped onion; when very hot, pour in the eggs, stir and when fried, serve, covering with a little ground pepper

title: Fried Eggs with Liver (Ovos Fritos com Fígado)
body:
## Ingredients

- six eggs
- two chopped chicken livers
- salt
- Comarí peppers
- parsley
- chopped onion leaves
- pepper
- grated nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs and add two chopped chicken livers, season with salt, Comarí peppers, parsley and chopped onion leaves
2. Fry in very hot fat, place on a plate, and serve, having sprinkled with pepper and grated nutmeg

title: Fried Eggs with Peanut Paste (Ovos Fritos de Passoca)
body:
## Ingredients

- six eggs
- two spoons of crushed peanuts
- salt
- one spoon of sugar
- nutmeg
- two spoons of wheat flour
- two spoons of cow butter

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs and add two spoons of crushed peanuts, a little salt, one spoon of sugar and nutmeg
2. Fry two spoons of wheat flour in two spoons of cow butter, stirring, and when very hot, pour in the eggs, continuing to stir until cooked
3. Serve, covering with sugar and cinnamon

title: Fried Mutton Feet (Pés de carneiro fritos)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- butter
- mutton feet, cleaned and scalded
- salt
- pepper
- marjoram
- mustard sauce
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cut an onion into slices and fry in butter until beginning to brown
2. Add the cleaned and scalded mutton feet with salt, pepper and marjoram
3. Stir until cooked, and serve with mustard sauce diluted in lemon juice

title: Fried Oysters (Ostras Fritas)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- two eggs
- half a spoon of polvilho
- one spoon of melted butter
- fat for frying
- pepper
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. After having parboiled the oysters in their own water, dry them one by one with a towel
2. Beat two eggs with half a spoon of polvilho and one spoon of melted butter
3. Pass the oysters through this mixture
4. Fry them in fat
5. Serve sprinkled with pepper and chopped parsley

title: Fried Tanajura (Tanajura Frita)
body:
## Ingredients

- tanajuras (a type of ant)
- hot water
- fat for frying
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Take a portion of tanajuras and scald them with hot water
2. Remove the abdomens
3. Fry them in fat
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
5. When well toasted, serve as a surprise dish

title: Fried Turtle Eggs (Ovos Fritos de Tartaruga)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two turtle eggs
- salt
- ground peppers
- fat
- one spoon of cassava flour

## Directions

1. Break one or two turtle eggs, beat well with a fork; add salt and ground peppers, pour into a pan with fat, fry, mixing in one spoon of cassava flour, and serve

title: Fígado de Porco à Italiana (Pork Liver Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork liver
- salt
- pimenta da India
- fennel seeds
- caul fat
- butter
- bread

## Directions

1. Take a pork liver and cut it into three-inch square pieces.
2. Sprinkle them well with salt and pimenta da India, roll each piece in fennel seeds so that each one is entirely covered with this seed.
3. Thread these pieces on a spit after wrapping each one in pieces of caul fat.
4. Twenty minutes are sufficient for them to be roasted.
5. At this point, remove them from the spit, place them on a platter and serve, putting on another plate some slices of bread toasted with butter.

title: Fígado de Raias Frito (Fried Ray Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Slices of bread
- Butter
- Ray fish livers
- Parsley
- Onions
- Breadcrumbs
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Fry slices of bread in butter and place on a plate
2. Melt two spoons of fresh butter
3. Fry the fish livers in it with plenty of chopped parsley and onions
4. Place this fried mixture on the bread slices
5. Dust with breadcrumbs
6. Put in the oven to brown
7. Serve squeezing lemon juice on top

title: Fígado de Vacca Coberto (Breaded Beef Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef liver
- salt
- ground pepper
- eggs, beaten
- wheat flour

## Directions

1. Cut the liver into slices the thickness of a finger
2. Sprinkle with salt and ground pepper
3. Dip in beaten eggs and roll finally in wheat flour
4. In a shallow frying pan, heat butter over high fire
5. When the butter is well heated, fry the slices on both sides
6. Serve plain or with a spicy sauce

title: Fígado de Vacca de Grelha (Grilled Beef Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef liver
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- parsley

## Directions

1. Cut the liver into more or less thin slices
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Roast on the grill on both sides
4. Serve by placing one slice on top of another, with a little butter and chopped parsley between the two slices

title: Fígado Ensopado com Beringelas (Stewed Liver with Eggplants)
body:
## Ingredients

- liver
- wheat flour
- fat
- water
- onion
- salt
- peppers
- eggplants

## Directions

1. Take the liver and cut it into slices the thickness of a finger.
2. Coat these in wheat flour and fry them on both sides in fat.
3. Once entirely fried, add two large cups of water, a cut onion, salt, and peppers.
4. Let them boil over low heat.
5. Half an hour before serving, add some eggplants cut into pieces.

title: Fígado Refogado (Sautéed Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Liver, sliced into equal pieces
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Garlic, chopped
- Chives
- Parsley
- Wheat flour
- White wine
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Melt a little butter in a frying pan and place the liver slices in it
2. Season with pepper and salt, adding chopped garlic, chives and parsley
3. Cook until done on both sides
4. Once cooked, drain the butter
5. Add a spoonful of wheat flour diluted in half a glass of white wine, taking care not to let it boil
6. When the sauce is thick, add the juice of a lemon and serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Assada e Lardeada (Guinea Fowl Roasted and Larded)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- thin strips of bacon
- salt
- liver of the bird
- half a quarter of finely chopped bacon
- a portion of bread crumb moistened in milk
- one spoonful of sugar
- nutmeg
- banana leaves

## Directions

1. Lard the breast of one of these birds with thin strips of bacon; sprinkle with salt, and stuff it with its liver chopped and mixed with half a quarter of finely chopped bacon, a portion of bread crumb moistened in milk, one spoonful of sugar, a little salt and grated nutmeg
2. Wrap the bird in banana leaves and roast it over coals and serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Cozida com Moranga (Guinea Fowl Boiled with Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- water
- salt
- one squash
- butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. After plucking and cleaning the bird, boil it in water and salt with one squash cut into pieces with seeds removed
2. When cooked, remove the pieces of squash, place them on a plate with the skin facing down
3. Cut the bird into pieces and place them on the squash, drizzling melted butter over all and dusting with sugar
4. Place the plate in the oven, let it roast for half an hour, and serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Ensopada com Carapicús (Guinea Fowl Stewed with Carapicú)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- three spoonfuls of fat
- carapicú
- half a dozen tomatoes
- salt
- one onion
- peppers
- parsley
- one glass of vinegar
- one cup of water

## Directions

1. Braise one bird cut into pieces with three spoonfuls of fat, add a portion of chopped carapicú, half a dozen tomatoes, salt, one chopped onion, peppers, parsley, and finally after stirring, one glass of vinegar and one cup of water
2. Let it boil and when cooked, serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Ensopada com Feijão (Guinea Fowl Stewed with Beans)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- fat
- beans or fresh fava beans
- water
- salt
- one orange

## Directions

1. Cut one bird into pieces; braise them in fat
2. When cooked, remove them, and braise in the same fat a portion of beans or fresh fava beans cooked in water and salt
3. Add the pieces of the bird and the juice of one orange; boil everything for half an hour near the fire and serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Estufada com Castanhas (Guinea Fowl Braised with Chestnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- Brazil nuts or small cashew nuts
- three spoonfuls of fat
- one cup of white wine
- one garlic clove
- salt
- parsley
- one onion
- pear
- marjoram
- one orange

## Directions

1. Stuff one bird with Brazil nuts or small cashew nuts with skin removed; sew the opening and braise it in three spoonfuls of fat
2. Add one cup of white wine, one garlic clove, salt, parsley, one onion cut into pieces, pear and a sprig of marjoram
3. Boil over a very lively bed of coals for two hours, and when cooked serve with its strained sauce mixed with one spoonful of orange juice

title: Galinha d'Angola Estufada com Tomates (Guinea Fowl Braised with Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- tomatoes
- one onion
- liver of the bird
- half a quarter of bacon
- salt
- peppers
- one spoonful of vinegar
- one cup of water

## Directions

1. Stuff one bird with tomatoes, one cut onion, the chopped liver, half a quarter of bacon, salt, and peppers, and place it in a pan over slices of bacon with one spoonful of vinegar, one cup of water, and more tomatoes
2. Cover the pan well and boil over regular fire; serve with its own sauce passed through a sieve

title: Galinha d'Angola Guisada com Creme (Guinea Fowl Stewed with Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- milk
- salt
- butter
- wheat flour
- two egg yolks
- one spoonful of sugar
- nutmeg
- ground cinnamon

## Directions

1. Boil one of these birds in milk and salt
2. When cooked, remove and cut it into pieces that are braised in butter, and dusted with wheat flour
3. When the milk is reduced, incorporate it with two egg yolks, one spoonful of sugar, nutmeg and ground cinnamon; place the bird once more in this sauce
4. Let it boil a little more and serve

title: Galinha d'Angola Recheada e Assada (Guinea Fowl Stuffed and Roasted)
body:
## Ingredients

- liver and giblets of the bird
- half a quarter of bacon
- two cooked eggs
- one onion
- one garlic clove
- peppers
- one slice of bacon

## Directions

1. Chop the liver and giblets of the bird with half a quarter of bacon; mix with two cooked eggs cut into small pieces, one onion, one garlic clove and peppers
2. Stuff the bird with this mixture, wrap it in a slice of bacon, roast it on a spit, moistening it with a sauce made of vinegar and butter
3. When cooked, remove and serve with its own defatted sauce

title: Galinha d'Angola Refogada (Guinea Fowl Braised)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- fat
- one onion
- half a dozen tomatoes
- one cup of water
- salt
- chopped parsley
- peppers
- one spoonful of cassava flour
- eight egg yolks
- sugar

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from the bird, cut it into pieces and braise it in fat with one chopped onion and half a dozen tomatoes
2. Then add one cup of water, salt, chopped parsley, peppers and one spoonful of cassava flour
3. Let it boil for half an hour and place it on a plate, pouring eight beaten egg yolks on top
4. Place the plate in the oven, let it roast until browned, and serve dusted with sugar

title: Galinha d'Angola Refogada com Arroz (Guinea Fowl Braised with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- one guinea fowl
- three spoonfuls of fat
- half a plate of chosen and washed rice
- half a bottle of water
- salt
- parsley leaves
- onion leaves
- half a dozen tomatoes

## Directions

1. Braise the bird in three spoonfuls of fat
2. Remove it, and pour into the same very hot fat half a plate of chosen and washed rice; stir and add half a bottle of water, salt, parsley and onion leaves, half a dozen tomatoes and the bird cut into pieces
3. Let it boil near the fire until the water dries up, and serve

title: Gallinha Assada (Roasted Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- one clean chicken
- its giblets
- two cooked eggs
- quarter pound of lard
- one onion
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- two spoonfuls of bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Take the clean chicken and fill the cavity of the breast and belly with its giblets, two cooked eggs, a quarter pound of lard, one onion and parsley, all chopped, salt, pepper and two spoonfuls of bread crumbs

title: Gallinha Assada (Roasted Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cleaned chicken
- its offal
- two cooked eggs
- half a quarter pound of bacon
- one onion
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- two tablespoons of breadcrumbs
- broth or wine
- melted butter
- salad

## Directions

1. Clean the chicken
2. Chop the offal, cooked eggs, bacon, onion, and parsley together with salt and pepper
3. Mix with two tablespoons of breadcrumbs and moisten with a little broth or wine
4. Stuff the chicken's breast and belly cavity with this mixture
5. Tie the chicken closed by folding the neck over the breast and tucking the beak under, crossing the feet over the belly and tucking them under the neck
6. Put on a spit and roast over low heat
7. Baste frequently with melted butter
8. Serve with salad

title: Gallinha Assada com Mólho dos Miudos (Roasted Chicken with Offal Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken
- the liver
- mustard powder
- one glass of white wine
- one tablespoon of vinegar
- one tablespoon of sugar
- a little grated nutmeg
- two tablespoons of fat
- one chopped onion

## Directions

1. Roast the chicken without stuffing it
2. Pound the liver well and mix with mustard powder, one glass of white wine, one tablespoon of vinegar, one tablespoon of sugar, and a little grated nutmeg
3. Melt two tablespoons of fat and fry a chopped onion in it
4. Add the mustard mixture with the liver and another glass of wine
5. Let it cook for a while
6. Serve with the roasted chicken

title: Gallinha Assada com Picado (Roasted Chicken with Chopped Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut in pieces
- water
- salt
- seasonings
- hot fat
- roasted mutton meat, chopped
- cooked ham, chopped
- breadcrumbs
- six egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces in water with salt and seasonings
2. Braise it afterwards in hot fat
3. Place it on a plate over a layer of chopped roasted mutton, cooked ham, and breadcrumbs
4. Cover with the same chopped mixture
5. Pour six egg yolks over it
6. Finish cooking in the oven

title: Gallinha Cheia Guisada (Stuffed Chicken Stewed)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of mutton, chopped
- half a pound of bacon
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- one onion
- three cooked eggs
- one chicken
- fat
- two cups of water
- onion leaves
- one glass of wine
- mangoes or taro root

## Directions

1. Chop one pound of mutton with half a pound of bacon, parsley, salt, pepper, one onion, and three cooked eggs
2. Stuff and truss the chicken with this mixture
3. Braise it in a little fat, turning it until browned
4. Add two cups of water with salt, pepper, onion leaves, and one glass of wine
5. Let it simmer over moderate heat for about one hour
6. Serve with fried mangoes or stewed taro root

title: Gallinha com Abobora d'Agua (Chicken with Water Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- two tablespoons of fat
- one tablespoon of wheat flour
- water squash, chopped into small pieces
- one bottle of water
- salt
- parsley
- marjoram
- perennial onion leaves
- a little juice of sour orange

## Directions

1. Braise the chicken pieces in two tablespoons of fat until they acquire good color
2. Stir in one tablespoon of wheat flour
3. Add the water squash chopped into small pieces
4. Heat, stirring so it does not stick to the bottom of the pan
5. Add one bottle of water, salt, parsley, marjoram, perennial onion leaves, and a little juice of sour orange
6. Simmer over moderate heat until cooked
7. Serve

title: Gallinha com Mólho Branco (Chicken with White Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken
- salt
- pepper
- one sprig of parsley
- onion leaves
- one tablespoon of wheat flour
- four to six cups of meat broth
- three egg yolks, beaten
- one tablespoon of wheat flour
- one tablespoon of butter
- one tablespoon of sugar
- one glass of white wine
- a little nutmeg
- lemon slices, peeled and without seeds

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces with salt, pepper, a sprig of parsley, onion leaves, and one tablespoon of wheat flour
2. Separately, make a sauce with four to six cups of meat broth and three beaten egg yolks, one tablespoon of wheat flour, one tablespoon of butter, one tablespoon of sugar, one glass of white wine, and a little nutmeg
3. Place the cooked chicken pieces in this sauce
4. Simmer a little longer
5. Serve with peeled lemon slices without seeds on top

title: Gallinha com Mólho de Passas (Chicken with Raisin Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- one tablespoon of wheat flour
- one tablespoon of butter
- one bowl of water
- one glass of red wine
- salt
- nutmeg
- three cardamom seeds
- chicken pieces
- one handful of raisins
- one dozen blanched and chopped almonds
- two tablespoons of sugar
- lemon slices, peeled and without seeds

## Directions

1. Fry one tablespoon of wheat flour in one tablespoon of butter until well toasted
2. Add one bowl of water, one glass of red wine, salt, nutmeg, and three cardamom seeds
3. Place the chicken pieces in this sauce
4. Let them simmer until cooked
5. Add one handful of raisins, one dozen blanched and chopped almonds, two tablespoons of sugar, and peeled lemon slices without seeds
6. Bring to a boil once more
7. Serve in this state

title: Gallinha com Mólho Pardo (Chicken with Brown Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken blood
- one glass of vinegar
- two tablespoons of fat
- one bottle of water
- salt
- one onion, cut
- a little grated nutmeg
- one tablespoon of fine manioc flour

## Directions

1. When killing the chicken, collect its blood in a plate with one glass of vinegar
2. Pluck and cut the chicken into pieces
3. Braise the pieces in two tablespoons of fat
4. Add one bottle of water, salt, the cut onion, a little grated nutmeg, the blood dissolved with vinegar, and one tablespoon of fine manioc flour
5. Let everything simmer
6. Serve; if the sauce is too sharp, add one tablespoon of sugar

title: Gallinha Cozida com Samambaia (Chicken Cooked with Fern)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut in pieces
- half a pound of bacon, chopped
- water
- salt
- onion leaves
- fern shoots

## Directions

1. Place the chicken pieces with half a pound of chopped bacon in a pan containing water, salt, and onion leaves
2. Let it simmer
3. When the chicken is cooked, remove it
4. In the same broth, simmer the fern shoots
5. When cooked, arrange them in order on the plate and cover with breadcrumbs
6. Pour melted butter over them
7. Serve with the chicken in the middle

title: Gallinha Cozida para Doentes (Boiled Chicken for the Ill)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, not more than eight months old and not yet brooded
- water
- salt
- celery root
- parsley root
- two lettuce leaves
- one chicory leaf

## Directions

1. Take a chicken not more than eight months old and that has not yet brooded
2. Kill it with a blow to the neck
3. After ten minutes, before it cools, place it in a pan with boiling water to scald it
4. Pluck the feathers and singe it over a straw fire
5. Open it and wash it thoroughly with hot water
6. Cut it into pieces, separating the legs, wings, neck, breast, etc.
7. Cook it with cold water, little salt, a piece of celery root, a parsley root, two lettuce leaves and one chicory leaf
8. When cooked, serve the broth after removing the fat, according to the doctor's recommendation, either plain, or over toasted bread, or with rice cooked in water and salt, without fat, etc.

title: Gallinha Cozida para os Convalescentes (Boiled Chicken for the Convalescent)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a chicken
- fat
- water
- salt
- one bay leaf
- parsley root
- celery root
- one onion leaf
- half a pound of beef

## Directions

1. Take half a chicken and cut it into pieces
2. Sauté these pieces in a little fat
3. Let them fry for ten minutes
4. Add water, salt, one bay leaf, parsley root, celery root, one onion leaf and half a pound of beef
5. Simmer until everything is well cooked
6. Strain the broth and pour it over slices of bread toasted on the grill, or serve with pasta or vermicelli well cooked, or with rice, mixing the chicken pieces into it

title: Gallinha Desossada (Boned Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- one plucked chicken
- one pound of veal, chopped
- half a pound of bacon
- chicken offal
- one onion
- salt
- parsley
- two green hot peppers
- six cooked eggs
- two tablespoons of butter
- one cup of water
- chicory

## Directions

1. Pluck the chicken and open it along the back, removing the ribs and breast bones
2. Chop one pound of veal with half a pound of bacon, the chicken offal, one onion, salt, parsley, two green hot peppers, and six cooked eggs
3. Stuff the chicken with this filling
4. Secure the opening with stitches
5. Place in a pan with two tablespoons of butter and one cup of water
6. Simmer over moderate heat until cooked
7. Serve with braised chicory

title: Gallinha Engrossada com Ovos (Chicken Thickened with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- fat
- one bottle of water
- one glass of white wine
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- pepper
- lemon juice
- three egg yolks
- a pinch of starch
- one tablespoon of sugar
- juice of one lemon
- one glass of white wine

## Directions

1. Braise the chicken pieces in fat and when browned, add one bottle of water, one glass of white wine, salt, parsley, onion leaves, pepper, and lemon juice
2. When cooked, add three egg yolks beaten with a pinch of starch, one tablespoon of sugar, the juice of one lemon, and one glass of white wine
3. Simmer a little longer
4. Serve

title: Gallinha Ensopada com Arroz à Camponeza (Chicken Stewed with Country-Style Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- melted fat
- half a plate of selected and washed rice
- one bottle of hot water
- salt
- perennial onion leaves
- parsley
- half a dozen Indian peppers

## Directions

1. Brown the chicken pieces in melted fat
2. After eight minutes, remove the pieces from the pan
3. In the same fat, when well hot, add half a plate of selected and washed rice
4. Stir until evenly coated with fat
5. Add one bottle of hot water, the chicken pieces, salt, perennial onion leaves, parsley, and half a dozen Indian peppers
6. Let simmer briefly
7. Move the pan near the fire to cook slowly until the rice is dry
8. Serve with the rice

title: Gallinha Ensopada com Quiabos (Chicken Stewed with Okra)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut into pieces
- half a pound of melted bacon
- four to six cups of water
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- two dozen okras, cut
- four comari peppers
- one spoon of fine cornmeal

## Directions

1. Cut the chicken into pieces and brown them in melted bacon.
2. Add water, salt, parsley, onion leaves, cut okras, comari peppers, and cornmeal.
3. Let them boil until cooked, and serve with cornmeal mush.

title: Gallinha Ensopada à Italiana (Chicken Stewed Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut into pieces
- half a pound of bacon
- half a pound of ham
- one onion
- two cloves
- one bay leaf
- a little nutmeg
- salt
- some peppers
- one cup of water
- one cup of wine
- half a plate of rice
- little water and salt for the rice
- butter
- grated cheese
- six egg yolks
- a little sugar

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces in bacon, ham, onion, cloves, bay leaf, nutmeg, salt, peppers, water and wine.
2. On another side, cook half a plate of rice with little water and salt.
3. When the rice is cooked and dry, place it on a buttered serving dish, half of the rice covered with grated cheese.
4. Place the chicken pieces on top, cover with the rest of the rice and another layer of cheese.
5. Pour six egg yolks beaten with a little sugar on top of everything.
6. Place the dish in the oven until the eggs are cooked, and serve.

title: Gallinha Ensopada à Italiana (Chicken Stewed Italian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut in pieces
- half a pound of bacon
- half a pound of ham
- one onion
- two cloves
- one bay leaf
- a little nutmeg
- salt
- peppers
- one cup of water
- one glass of wine

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces in half a pound of bacon, half a pound of ham, one onion, two cloves, one bay leaf, a little nutmeg, salt, peppers, one cup of water, and one glass of wine

title: Gallinha Frita na Capa (Fried Chicken in Breadcrumbs)
body:
## Ingredients

- legs and wings of two or three chickens
- salt
- pepper
- chopped parsley
- breadcrumbs
- butter
- salads

## Directions

1. Take the legs and wings of two or three chickens, seasoned with salt, pepper and chopped parsley.
2. Cover them with breadcrumbs and moisten with butter.
3. Roast them on the grill or fry them in a little fat, and serve with salads.

title: Gallinha Frita à Parmezão (Fried Chicken Parmesan Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken legs, breast, wings and all fleshy parts
- salt and other seasonings
- butter
- grated cheese
- melted butter
- four egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook the legs, breast, wings and all fleshy parts of the chicken with salt and other seasonings.
2. When almost cooked, remove the bones, trying to keep the parts in shape as much as possible.
3. Fry them in fat until they are browned.
4. Place them on a buttered plate over a layer of grated cheese, and cover with another layer.
5. Pour melted butter and four beaten egg yolks on top.
6. Place the plate in the oven until the eggs are cooked.

title: Gallinha Guisada com Carapicú (Chicken Stewed with Carapicú)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken, cut into pieces
- half a pound of chopped bacon
- one bottle of water
- a portion of carapicús, chosen and boiled beforehand
- salt
- parsley
- comari pepper
- nutmeg
- a little crumb of bread
- juice of one lemon
- cornmeal mush or cassava flour paste

## Directions

1. Cut the chicken into pieces and place them in the pan with half a pound of chopped bacon.
2. Fry for a while, stirring constantly until the chicken is browned.
3. Then add a bottle of water, a portion of carapicús that have been chosen and boiled beforehand, salt, parsley, comari pepper, nutmeg and a little crumb of bread.
4. Let everything boil until cooked.
5. Before serving, add the juice of one lemon, and serve with cornmeal mush or cassava flour paste.

title: Gallinha Picada com Grelos de Abóbora (Minced Chicken with Squash Shoots)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken
- half a pound of ham
- water
- little salt
- one onion
- parsley
- squash shoots
- breadcrumbs
- cheese
- sauce

## Directions

1. Take the chicken, remove the meat from the bones, and cut it into pieces.
2. Cook it with half a pound of ham in water, little salt, one onion and parsley.
3. When cooked, remove and mince the meat very finely, as well as the ham.
4. Boil the squash shoots in the broth.
5. When cooked, remove them and place on a plate, putting the minced meat on top.
6. Cover with a layer of breadcrumbs and another of cheese, and pour the strained and reduced sauce on top.
7. Place in a well-heated oven and serve.

title: Gallinha Recheada com Arroz (Chicken Stuffed with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken
- water
- salt
- all necessary seasonings
- half a plate of rice
- a quarter of ham
- a quarter of bacon, chopped
- clove
- pepper
- onion, cut
- a little water
- melted butter
- salad

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken whole in water, salt, and all necessary seasonings.
2. On another side, boil half a plate of rice with a quarter of ham and another of chopped bacon, clove, pepper, salt and cut onion, with a little water, the rice should remain whole after cooking.
3. Fill the chicken with it, and placed on a spit, roast it, moistening it frequently with melted butter, and serve with salad.

title: Gallinha Recheada com Massa Fina (Chicken Stuffed with Fine Paste)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cooked chicken
- two handfuls of breadcrumbs
- a quarter of washed raisins
- two spoons of butter
- five egg yolks
- nutmeg
- clove
- sugar

## Directions

1. After the chicken is cooked, fill it with the following mixture: take two handfuls of breadcrumbs, a quarter of washed raisins, two spoons of butter, five egg yolks, nutmeg, clove and sugar.
2. Mix everything well and fill the chicken.
3. Place it in a pan with a little fat and roast until it is a good color, and serve with salad.

title: Gallinha Refogada com Cará do Ar (Chicken Stewed with Air Yam)
body:
## Ingredients

- one clean chicken
- water
- salt
- onion leaves
- parsley
- marjoram
- large peppers
- air yams, split

## Directions

1. Take the clean chicken and cut it into pieces
2. Place these pieces in a pan with already boiling water, salt, onion leaves, parsley, marjoram, large peppers and split air yams
3. Let them boil and when cooked, serve

title: Gallinha Refogada com Mangaritas e Carurú (Chicken Stewed with Mangaritas and Caruru)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken parts
- melted fat
- one onion, split
- parsley
- four cups of water
- one spoonful of cornmeal
- one spoonful of vinegar
- mangaritas
- water
- salt
- caruru

## Directions

1. Sauté the chicken parts in melted fat with one split onion and parsley
2. Add four cups of water, one spoonful of cornmeal and one spoonful of vinegar
3. Let boil over coals until the chicken is cooked and serve with mangaritas cooked in water and salt, placing in the bottom of the tray some caruru sautéed in fat

title: Gallinha Refogada com Palmitos (Chicken Braised with Heart of Palm)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- half a pound of bacon, chopped
- one cup of water
- salt
- pepper
- one heart of palm, chopped and washed in cold water

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces with the chopped bacon and one cup of water, salt and pepper
2. When cooked, remove the chicken pieces
3. Add the chopped and washed heart of palm to the broth
4. Let it cook while stirring
5. Serve with the chicken and cornmeal mush

title: Gallinha Refogada com Palmitos (Chicken Stewed with Palm Hearts)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken pieces
- half a pound of lard, chopped
- one cup of water
- salt
- pepper
- one palm heart, chopped and washed
- cornmeal mush

## Directions

1. Cook the chicken pieces with half a pound of chopped lard and one cup of water, salt and pepper
2. When cooked, remove them and pour into the broth one chopped palm heart washed in cold water
3. Let it cook, stirring, and serve with the chicken and cornmeal mush

title: Gallinha Servida Fria (Cold Served Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- one old chicken, cleaned
- slices of bacon
- one pound of ham, sliced
- one beef foot
- one onion
- clove
- little salt
- pepper
- parsley
- marjoram
- meat broth

## Directions

1. Place the cleaned chicken on some slices of bacon with one pound of ham in slices, covered with more slices of bacon.
2. Place around it a piece of beef foot, one onion, clove, little salt, pepper, parsley and marjoram.
3. Cover everything with meat broth and boil near the fire for four hours.
4. Then carefully remove the chicken so it does not fall apart and place it on a plate with the ham around it.
5. Strain the broth through a sieve and reduce it to a few spoons.
6. Pour this sauce on top and serve cold.

title: Ganso Assado no Espeto (Roasted Goose on a Spit)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- salt
- onion juice

## Directions

1. After plucking and cleaning the goose, rub it with salt and onion juice.
2. Roast it initially over a very lively fire to drain the excess fat.
3. Then roast for one hour over moderate fire to cook it.
4. Finally roast for a quarter hour over a very active fire to take on good color.
5. Serve with its sauce after removing the fat.

title: Ganso Assado no Espeto com Pinhões ou Castanhas (Roasted Goose on a Spit with Pine Nuts or Chestnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- goose liver
- two egg yolks
- a handful of bread crumb
- salt
- pepper
- half a hundred pine nuts or peeled chestnuts

## Directions

1. Take the goose liver, two egg yolks, a handful of bread crumb, salt and pepper, all finely chopped.
2. Mix them with half a hundred peeled pine nuts or chestnuts.
3. Fill the goose with this stuffing.
4. Roast it on a spit; when cooked and of good color, serve it. This stuffing is the best for goose, as it absorbs the excess fat.

title: Ganso Assado no Espeto à Ingleza (Roasted Goose on a Spit, English Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose, preferably young
- one dozen onions of medium size
- butter
- goose liver
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- marjoram

## Directions

1. Braise in butter one dozen onions of medium size.
2. Mix them with the goose liver, finely chopped, adding salt, pepper, chopped parsley and marjoram.
3. After the goose is seasoned with salt, fill it with this stuffing.
4. Roast it on a spit and serve.

title: Ganso Assado no Espeto à Ingleza (Roasted Goose on a Spit, English Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose
- butter
- twelve onions of medium size
- goose liver, chopped
- salt
- pepper
- parsley, chopped
- marjoram

## Directions

1. Sauté in butter a dozen onions of medium size, mix them with the chopped goose liver, adding salt, pepper, chopped parsley and marjoram
2. After the goose is seasoned with salt, fill it with this stuffing
3. Then roast it on a spit and serve

title: Ganso Assado no Forno (Roasted Goose in the Oven)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- prunes and apples, peeled
- salt
- marjoram
- bananas
- sweet potatoes
- cassava
- potatoes or salad for serving

## Directions

1. Take the cleaned goose and fill it with peeled prunes and apples, adding salt and marjoram.
2. In the absence of prunes and apples, one may use peeled bananas, sweet potatoes, or peeled cassava cut into pieces.
3. Place this in a pan and roast in the oven or over embers.
4. Serve with potatoes or salad.

title: Ganso com Molho Pardo (Goose with Brown Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose legs and feet
- goose giblets, cleaned
- goose head, neck, wings and offal
- blood from the goose, collected in a bowl with vinegar
- six or eight quinces, cut and peeled
- eight bananas
- a portion of sweet potatoes, cut
- salt
- pepper
- marjoram
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take the legs and feet of the goose, which are wrapped with the giblets of the same bird after being well cleaned.
2. Add the head, neck, wings, and offal, and place all in a pan with the blood of the bird, collected in a bowl with vinegar, and dissolved in a bowl of water.
3. Add six or eight quinces, cut and peeled, eight bananas, a portion of sweet potatoes cut, salt, pepper, marjoram and some sugar.
4. If the seasoning is too sour, add sugar; if not, allow to boil, and when cooked, with the broth reduced and thick, serve.

title: Ganso Cozido à Portuguesa (Boiled Goose Portuguese Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- one bottle of white wine
- one cup of vinegar
- one bowl of meat broth
- salt
- bay leaves
- parsley
- one onion
- two cloves

## Directions

1. Cut the goose into pieces and blanch them in hot water.
2. When cooled, remove and place to cook in one bottle of white wine, one cup of vinegar, one bowl of meat broth, salt, bay leaves, parsley, one onion, two cloves.
3. When cooked, remove the meat and reduce the broth.
4. Serve with this sauce.

title: Ganso Ensopado com Arroz (Goose Stewed with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- one young goose
- bananas or apples, peeled and cut into pieces
- half a plate of chosen and washed rice
- one bowl of water
- parsley
- salt
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Take a young goose and fill it with peeled bananas or apples cut into pieces.
2. Braise it, roasting it in the pan with little fire in its own fat until well roasted and of uniform color, turning it from time to time.
3. Remove it and pour into this same fat, which should be very hot, half a plate of chosen and washed rice.
4. Stir until everything heats well, then add one bowl of water, the goose cut into pieces, some pieces of bananas, parsley, salt, nutmeg.
5. Allow to boil with little fire until the water dries up.
6. Put the rice on the plate and serve with the meat placed on top.

title: Ganso Ensopado com Quiabos (Goose Stewed with Okra)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose meat
- one spoon of butter
- one bottle of meat broth
- one spoon of wheat flour
- two beaten egg yolks
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- a portion of fresh whole okra

## Directions

1. Cut the goose meat into pieces; after removing the bones, braise them in one spoon of butter.
2. When well fried, add one bottle of meat broth, one spoon of wheat flour, two beaten egg yolks, salt, parsley, onion leaves and a portion of fresh whole okra.
3. Allow everything to boil until the meat is well cooked, and serve.

title: Ganso Ensopado com Samambaia (Goose Stewed with Fern)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose pieces
- fat
- water
- salt
- pepper
- one onion
- parsley
- marjoram
- fern sprouts
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Take the pieces of goose, pass them in hot fat, and cook them, adding water, salt, pepper, one onion, parsley and marjoram.
2. When almost cooked, pour into the broth a portion of washed fern sprouts, and after two boils, remove them and pour over a platter covered with breadcrumbs.
3. Place the pieces of goose on top, pouring over everything a portion of butter, in which a finely chopped onion should have been fried; and serve thus.

title: Ganso Estufado com Marmelos (Goose Stewed with Quinces)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- quinces, cut in two or four pieces
- salt
- cumin
- marjoram
- cassava roots, peeled and cut into pieces
- one cup of water
- parsley
- lemon peel

## Directions

1. Fill the goose with quinces cut in two or four pieces (according to its size), with a little salt, cumin and a little marjoram.
2. Place the goose in the pan, and around it, some peeled cassava roots cut into pieces, with one cup of water, salt, parsley, and lemon peel.
3. Cover the pan tightly and allow to boil, at first over gentle fire to let the goose fat melt, and then over very active fire, for two to three hours.
4. Serve whole with the cassava around it.

title: Ganso Estufado com Palmitos (Goose Stewed with Heart of Palm)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- one heart of palm, cut
- salt
- pepper
- one onion, chopped
- one sprig of marjoram
- a portion of cloves
- some pieces of cinnamon
- two glasses of white wine
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Fill a goose with one heart of palm, cut and mixed with salt, pepper, one chopped onion, one sprig of marjoram and a portion of cloves studded in the breast, as well as some pieces of cinnamon.
2. Then place it in a pan with two glasses of white wine.
3. Cover the pan tightly and allow to boil over moderate fire for two to three hours.
4. Serve with its own sauce, after removing the fat, and placing around it a portion of potatoes fried in the same sauce.

title: Ganso Guisado com Mangalô (Goose Stewed with Pigeon Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- water
- salt
- grated nutmeg
- one onion, chopped
- a portion of pigeon peas
- butter
- bread

## Directions

1. Boil the goose, divided into pieces, with water and salt.
2. When half cooked, remove the broth and fry these pieces in their own fat with a little grated nutmeg and one chopped onion.
3. On the other hand, boil a portion of pigeon peas in water and salt, and when cooked, remove them and pass them through a sieve.
4. Braise this pulp in butter, place it on the plate, covering it with bread cut into small pieces and fried in butter.
5. Place the goose on top and pour melted butter over it.

title: Ganso Guisado com Pepinos (Goose Stewed with Cucumbers)
body:
## Ingredients

- one goose
- water
- salt
- parsley
- one onion studded with cloves
- one dozen cucumbers
- cow butter
- wheat flour
- lemon

## Directions

1. Boil a goose in water, salt, parsley, one onion studded with cloves, until half cooked.
2. Remove the meat from the bones and cut it into long strips the thickness of a finger.
3. Fry these strips in cow butter after rolling them in wheat flour.
4. At this time, peel one dozen cucumbers, remove their cores, and split them into four or eight strips according to their size.
5. Put these strips in the broth in which the goose was cooked; after two boils, place them on the plate with slices of the fried goose on top, pouring over them the butter in which the meat was fried.
6. Having decorated with some slices of lemon without peel, send to the table.

title: Ganso Refogado com Abóbora d'Água (Sautéed Goose with Water Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose pieces
- lard
- water squash, peeled
- water
- wine
- parsley
- salt
- onion leaves

## Directions

1. Take the goose pieces, sauté them in three spoons of lard, turning them until evenly roasted
2. Remove them and put in the same lard a portion of peeled water squash, with the core removed and cut into small pieces
3. Stir them until well coated with lard, and add to them one cup of water, another of wine and the goose pieces, parsley, salt and onion leaves
4. Place near the fire to finish cooking and serve

title: Ganso Refogado com Tomates (Sautéed Goose with Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose
- lard
- salt
- pepper
- onion leaves
- tomatoes
- meat broth or white wine
- wheat flour

## Directions

1. Take a goose, cut it into pieces which are placed in a pan; if well fatty, heat them slowly at first so they release their fat, and if not fatty, add to them two spoons of lard with the meat, salt, pepper and onion leaves
2. After they are fried a little, add to them a portion of tomatoes, one cup of broth, or better white wine, one spoon of wheat flour
3. Let them boil over low heat until the meat is cooked and serve

title: Garlic Butter (Manteiga de Alho)
body:
## Ingredients

- two heads of garlic
- one spoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Boil two heads of garlic until reduced to a pulp; mix with one spoonful of butter and keep to season sauces.

title: Garlic Water (Agua de Alho)
body:
## Ingredients

- one head of garlic
- salt
- one spoonful of water

## Directions

1. Take one head of garlic, pound it with a little salt and one spoonful of water, and pass it through a sieve; this is the pulp used for sauces.

title: Gelea de Laranjas (Orange Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- juice of twelve oranges
- half pound sugar
- egg white
- one bottle of jelly

## Directions

1. Boil the juice of twelve oranges with the syrup of half pound of sugar at thread stage
2. Clarify the sugar with egg white, and after straining, add one bottle of jelly
3. Boil once more and pour into a vessel
4. Let it cool, and when hard, place the vessel in a pan with hot water so the jelly slips off
5. Turn over onto a plate and serve

title: Gelea de Malaga (Malaga Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound sugar
- juice of one lemon
- one pound jelly
- one glass Malaga wine

## Directions

1. Make a syrup with one pound of sugar
2. When at thread stage, add the juice of one lemon, one pound of jelly and one glass of Malaga wine
3. Let it boil for an instant, pour the liquid into a form, and proceed as already stated above

title: Gelea de Marmelos à Brazileira (Brazilian Quince Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- four dozen quinces, split
- one pound sugar syrup
- cloves
- cinnamon
- lemon rinds

## Directions

1. Boil four dozen split quinces
2. When cooked, strain them
3. Add one pound of sugar syrup, some cloves, cinnamon, and lemon rinds
4. Let it boil until reduced to two bottles worth
5. Let it cool and serve

title: Gemada Branca Gommada (White Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- one bottle of milk
- a little salt
- four spoonfuls of sugar
- some pieces of cinnamon
- cloves of India
- four ounces of crumb of bread
- one spoonful of cornstarch
- six egg whites

## Directions

1. Boil one bottle of milk with a little salt, four spoonfuls of sugar, some pieces of cinnamon, and cloves of India
2. Reduce to half
3. Add four ounces of crumb of bread and boil until the bread dissolves
4. Strain through a sieve
5. Add one spoonful of cornstarch beaten with six egg whites, mixing the white into the milk little by little
6. Boil again two to three times
7. Place in a bowl and let cool
8. Turn this mass onto a plate so that it comes out whole
9. Cover lightly with sugar and cinnamon powder
10. Serve

title: Gemada com Aletria (Custard with Vermicelli)
body:
## Ingredients

- six eggs
- three spoonfuls of sugar
- one bottle of milk
- vermicelli cooked in water
- sugar
- cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs with three spoonfuls of sugar
2. Mix in little by little one bottle of milk
3. Place on the fire and boil
4. Add the vermicelli cooked in water and removed with a skimmer to drain well
5. Let boil until it thickens
6. Place in plates
7. Cover with sugar and cinnamon powder
8. Serve

title: Gemada de Amendoas (Almond Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- four ounces of peeled almonds
- four spoonfuls of sugar
- eight egg yolks
- a little grated nutmeg
- one bottle of milk

## Directions

1. Pound four ounces of peeled almonds with four spoonfuls of sugar
2. When the paste is homogeneous, mix in eight egg yolks, a little grated nutmeg, and finally one bottle of milk
3. Boil over coals until it thickens
4. Cover with sugar and cinnamon powder

title: Gemada de Biscoutos ou Bolachas (Biscuit Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- four egg yolks
- two spoonfuls of sugar
- a portion of grated biscuits
- one bottle of milk
- some lemon zest
- cinnamon
- cloves of India

## Directions

1. Beat four egg yolks with two spoonfuls of sugar and a portion of grated biscuits
2. Add little by little one bottle of milk, some lemon zest, cinnamon and cloves of India
3. Let boil until thick
4. Pour over cut biscuits
5. Let cool
6. Cover with a little sugar and cinnamon
7. Serve

title: Gemada de Polvilho (Cornstarch Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- four spoonfuls of cornstarch or arrowroot
- one bottle of milk
- six egg yolks
- three spoonfuls of sugar
- sugar
- cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Dissolve four spoonfuls of cornstarch or arrowroot in one bottle of milk
2. Mix in six beaten egg yolks with three spoonfuls of sugar
3. Place everything on the fire and boil, stirring constantly until it thickens
4. When cold, place on a plate
5. Cover with sugar and cinnamon powder
6. Send to the table

title: Gemada do Reino (Royal Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a dozen egg yolks
- four spoonfuls of sugar
- a little grated nutmeg
- ground cinnamon
- grated vanilla
- one bottle of white wine

## Directions

1. Beat half a dozen egg yolks with four spoonfuls of sugar, a little grated nutmeg, ground cinnamon and grated vanilla
2. Add little by little one bottle of white wine
3. Then place on the fire
4. Let boil several times
5. Serve plain, to serve as a sauce for puddings

title: Gemada Queimada (Burnt Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- five spoonfuls of wheat flour
- one spoonful of butter
- one bottle of milk
- eight egg yolks
- three spoonfuls of sugar
- a little grated nutmeg
- sugar
- cinnamon powder

## Directions

1. Fry five spoonfuls of wheat flour in one spoonful of butter
2. Having browned, gradually add one bottle of milk and eight beaten egg yolks with three spoonfuls of sugar and a little grated nutmeg
3. Boil until thickened
4. Place on a plate when cold, with sugar and cinnamon powder
5. Pass a hot iron over the top to caramelize the sugar

title: Gerumbeba Guisada (Stewed Prickly Pear)
body:
## Ingredients

- prickly pears
- wheat flour
- lard
- water
- salt
- peppers
- parsley
- egg yolk
- sour orange juice

## Directions

1. Place a quantity of prickly pears over hot coals to burn off the spines that cover them
2. Then peel them
3. Coat them in wheat flour
4. Sauté them in lard
5. Add a cup of water, salt, pepper and parsley
6. Boil for a quarter of an hour
7. Incorporate a beaten egg yolk mixed with sour orange juice and serve

title: Gilós Refogados (Sautéed Okra)
body:
## Ingredients

- okra
- water
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Take a quantity of okra and remove only the skin that covers them
2. Boil them for five minutes in water and salt
3. Place them on a plate
4. Mix with a little pepper and a spoonful of vinegar and serve

title: Gilós Refogados com Frango (Sautéed Okra with Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- okra
- salt

## Directions

1. Sauté chicken cut into pieces
2. When cooked, add okra cut in rounds
3. Let it boil a little and serve

title: Glândula de Vitella Frita (Fried Veal Glands)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal glands
- water
- vinegar
- salt
- parsley
- pepper
- garlic
- wheat flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil the gland for fifteen to twenty minutes in water
2. Let cool, then soak for two hours in a mixture of vinegar, salt, parsley, pepper, and garlic
3. Coat in wheat flour and fry in butter

title: Glândulas de Vitella Ensopadas (Stewed Veal Glands)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal glands
- water
- butter
- one tablespoon wheat flour
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- four cups meat broth
- one cará root, cut in slices
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Give the glands a boil, then place in cold water
2. In a separate preparation, melt a little butter, add one tablespoon wheat flour, salt, parsley, and onion leaves without browning
3. Add four cups meat broth, sliced cará, and the glands cut into pieces
4. Let boil until cooked
5. Before serving, add a little lemon juice

title: Glândulas Fritas, Outro Modo (Fried Glands, Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal glands
- hot water
- salt
- pepper
- garlic
- lemon juice
- onion
- butter
- endive, chicory, or chopped cabbage for serving

## Directions

1. Scald the glands in hot water
2. Place in a mixture of salt, pepper, garlic, lemon juice, and chopped onion for one hour
3. Fry in butter and serve with endive, chicory, or chopped cabbage

title: Golden Mutton Feet (Pés de carneiro dourados)
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton feet
- water
- salt
- cooked and chopped ham
- onion
- parsley
- butter
- breadcrumbs
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook the feet in water and salt
2. Remove the bones and stuff with cooked and chopped ham mixed with one chopped onion and parsley
3. Butter the dish in which they are to be served, placing at the bottom a layer of leftover ham
4. Place the stuffed feet on this layer, covered with the rest of the chopped ham
5. Sprinkle with a layer of breadcrumbs and pour beaten egg yolks over all
6. Bake in the oven until well browned, and serve with salad

title: Golden Sauce (Molho Dourado)
body:
## Ingredients

- one full spoonful of butter
- salt
- pepper
- one spoonful of wheat flour or polvilho
- two egg yolks
- one or two spoonfuls of vinegar
- substance of braised beef

## Directions

1. Put in a casserole one full spoonful of butter, salt and pepper; when melted, add one spoonful of wheat flour or polvilho.
2. When well mixed, remove from the fire and add two beaten egg yolks with one or two spoonfuls of vinegar; add a little substance of braised beef.
3. It is a true golden sauce, very delicate, easy to make, and that can be served with almost all roasted and fried meats, pies, etc; it is used in all cases in which white sauce is used.

title: Grelos de Abobora, de Samambaia, Talos de Tayoba e Palmito (Squash Shoots, Fern, Taro Stalks and Heart of Palm)
body:
## Ingredients

- any of these vegetables
- water
- salt
- fat
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Take any of these vegetables, peel and boil for a few minutes in salted water
2. Remove with a skimmer, let drain
3. Place in a casserole with a little fat to fry
4. Add breadcrumbs and salt, stirring to fry evenly

title: Grelos de Abobora, Samambaia, Tayoba, etc. Assados (Roasted Squash Shoots, Fern, Taro, etc.)
body:
## Ingredients

- any of these vegetables
- water
- salt
- milk
- two egg yolks
- grated cheese
- ground pepper

## Directions

1. Peel and boil any of these vegetables in salted water
2. Remove with a skimmer and dry with a towel
3. Boil afterwards in milk, thickening at the end with two egg yolks
4. Pour onto a plate, covering it with layers of grated cheese and ground pepper
5. Place in the oven until the cheese is browned and serve

title: Grelos de Bananeira Refogados (Sautéed Banana Plant Shoots)
body:
## Ingredients

- banana plant shoots
- water
- salt
- fat
- cornmeal
- tomatoes
- half cup of milk

## Directions

1. Take banana plant shoots found at the ends of the bunches
2. Chop them very fine and boil with water and salt
3. Drain well and squeeze
4. Sauté with a little fat
5. Add cornmeal, tomatoes, and half cup of milk
6. Boil at the edge of the fire until cooked and serve

title: Grão de Bico Cozido (Cooked Chickpeas)
body:
## Ingredients

- chickpeas
- water
- butter
- onion
- salt
- garlic

## Directions

1. Choose and wash a portion of chickpeas and put to cook over the fire for six hours or more, supplying with water from time to time.
2. Once cooked, melt a spoonful of butter with a chopped onion, salt and a crushed clove of garlic.
3. Add the chickpeas with their broth, boil until the water reduces and serve.

title: Guandú Ensopado (Stewed Pigeon Pea)
body:
## Ingredients

- pigeon peas
- water
- salt
- fat
- onion
- parsley

## Directions

1. Take a portion of still tender pigeon peas and boil them with little water and salt.
2. Melt a spoonful of fat in a casserole with an onion.
3. Add the pigeon pea with its broth, a little parsley, boil over moderate fire and serve.

title: Guandú Guisado (Braised Pigeon Pea)
body:
## Ingredients

- pigeon peas
- water
- salt
- cornmeal
- fat
- garlic
- parsley
- onion leaves
- sour orange juice

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of pigeon peas in water and salt, drain the water when cooked.
2. Fry a spoonful of cornmeal with two spoonfuls of fat, little salt, a clove of garlic, parsley, onion leaves.
3. Add half a bottle of water, and when the cornmeal is browned, add a glass of sour orange juice.
4. Boil a little and add the pigeon pea in this broth, leaving to boil over coals, serve.

title: Guaraná (Guaraná Drink)
body:
## Ingredients

- guaraná
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Scrape a portion of guaraná with a coarse grater
2. Place it in a glass with sugar
3. Pour warm or cold water over it according to taste or necessity
4. Drink with a spoon
5. This drink is very refreshing and serves well in great heat to prevent fever and to stop diarrhea

title: Guibebe de Moranga (Squash Mash)
body:
## Ingredients

- squash or pumpkin
- water
- salt
- lard
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut into pieces a squash or pumpkin
2. Remove the seeds and cook the pieces in water and salt
3. When cooked, scrape the pulp and sauté it in melted lard with salt, pepper and a glass of vinegar
4. Boil a little more and serve

title: Guibebe de Moranga (Stewed Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- one squash or any pumpkin
- water
- salt
- melted fat
- pepper
- one glass of vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut the squash into pieces
2. Remove the seeds
3. Cook the pieces in water and salt
4. When cooked, scrape the flesh
5. Sauté in melted fat with salt, pepper and one glass of vinegar
6. Boil a little more and serve

title: Guisadas Hervilhas (Stewed Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- a spoon of lard
- one onion, chopped
- a little nutmeg
- one spoon of breadcrumbs
- cooked peas with broth

## Directions

1. Fry a spoon of lard with a chopped onion, a little nutmeg and a spoon of breadcrumbs
2. Add the cooked peas with broth
3. Let it cook a little more and serve

title: Guisado de Almondegas de Gallinha Douradas (Stew of Golden Chicken Meatballs)
body:
## Ingredients

- prepared and fried meatballs
- three cups of milk
- three egg yolks
- more than one cup of milk
- two cloves
- one spoonful of sugar
- one glass of wine

## Directions

1. When the meatballs are made and fried, place them to simmer in the following sauce
2. Boil three cups of milk and add three beaten egg yolks, diluted in more than one cup of milk
3. Add to them two cloves, one spoonful of sugar, and one glass of wine
4. Give it another boil and serve with the meatballs

title: Guisado de Carneiro Assado (Braised Roasted Lamb)
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover roasted lamb loins
- one tablespoon cornstarch
- one tablespoon butter
- two cups white wine
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cut leftover roasted loins into pieces
2. Fry one tablespoon cornstarch with one tablespoon butter until lightly browned
3. Add two cups white wine and a little nutmeg
4. Stir and add the meat
5. Give it a boil and serve

title: Guisado de Carneiro Assado (Stew of Roasted Lamb)
body:
## Ingredients

- Leftovers of roasted loins
- Polvilho
- Butter
- White wine
- Nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cut the leftovers of roasted loins into pieces
2. Fry a spoonful of polvilho with another of butter until lightly browned
3. Add two cups of white wine and a little nutmeg
4. Stir and add the meat immediately after
5. Serve after giving it a boil

title: Guisado de Carneiro com Carurú (Lamb Stew with Caruru)
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover roasted lamb
- fat
- two tablespoons cornmeal
- three cups meat broth or water
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- a handful of chopped caruru, scalded and boiled

## Directions

1. Cut roasted lamb into pieces
2. Fry briefly in fat with two tablespoons cornmeal
3. Add three cups meat broth or water, salt, parsley, onion leaves, and a handful of scalded and boiled caruru
4. Boil over coals for half an hour
5. Serve

title: Guisado de Carneiro com Grelos de Samambaia (Lamb Stew with Fern Shoots)
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover lamb
- fern shoots
- salt
- parsley
- onion leaves
- celery
- half bowl milk
- one tablespoon wheat flour
- one tablespoon cow butter

## Directions

1. Cut leftover lamb into small pieces
2. Cook with fern shoots, salt, parsley, onion leaves, celery, and half bowl milk
3. Finally add one tablespoon wheat flour fried in one tablespoon cow butter until lightly browned
4. Serve

title: Guisado de Carneiro com Talos de Inhame (Lamb Stew with Yam Stems)
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover lamb
- one tablespoon cornmeal
- one teaspoon cornstarch
- one onion
- parsley
- salt
- two wine glasses
- same amount water or meat broth
- sugar
- two egg yolks
- yam stems, peeled and boiled
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Cut leftover lamb into pieces and fry until browned with one tablespoon cornmeal, one teaspoon cornstarch, one onion, parsley, and salt
2. Add two wine glasses of wine, same amount of water or meat broth, sugar, and two beaten egg yolks
3. Boil for one hour over coals
4. Serve the sauce over peeled, scalded yam stems boiled in water and salt for at least one hour until they lose their bitter taste
5. Cover with a layer of grated cheese

title: Guisado de Carneiro com Tayoba (Lamb Stew with Tayoba)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted lamb
- tayoba fern shoot tips, peeled and scalded
- one tablespoon fat
- three cups white wine
- salt
- cinnamon
- nutmeg
- one tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Cut roasted lamb into pieces and peel and scald tayoba shoot tips
2. Braise in a pan with one tablespoon fat and three cups white wine, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and one tablespoon sugar
3. Boil near the fire for one hour
4. Serve with cornmeal angú

title: Guisado de Carneiro ou Cabrito sobre Torradas (Mutton or Kid Stew on Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover roasted kid
- carapicús
- garlic
- onion
- parsley
- pitted olives
- butter
- bread

## Directions

1. Take the leftover roasted kid and chop it finely with carapicús, garlic, onion, parsley, and pitted olives
2. Fry them in a little butter
3. Place on slices of bread fried in butter
4. Put the plate in the oven
5. Serve hot

title: Guisado de Lombo de Vacca (Braised Beef Loin)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef loin
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut a beef loin into four portions; take these to the press, roll them, and place them thus rolled in a casserole, seasoned with salt and pepper.
2. Melt a little butter, which is then poured over the meat to go to the fire.
3. At the time of serving this stew, submit it again to more intense heat, turning it. Then place it in a casserole, pouring over it the substance that remains in the vessel.

title: Guisado de Miudos (Stew of Offal)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork offal (lungs, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, tongue)
- water
- salt
- fat
- garlic
- onion
- parsley
- pimenta da India
- cumin
- bay leaves
- tomatoes
- wheat flour
- cassava flour or corn flour

## Directions

1. The offal includes the lungs, heart, liver, kidneys, stomach, and tongue.
2. Take the pork offal and blanch in water and salt.
3. After blanching, cut it into small pieces and sauté in very hot fat, having brought all the seasonings such as salt, garlic, chopped onion, parsley, pimenta da India, cumin, bay leaves, and some tomatoes.
4. Add a little water after everything is well seasoned.
5. Take two tablespoons of wheat flour, dissolve in a little water, and thicken the offal, which is eaten with cassava flour or cornmeal mush.
6. If desired, add more water to the broth to make a cassava flour porridge, which is made in a deep platter by pouring the hot broth over it little by little and stirring with a fork.
7. Garnish the platter with sprigs of parsley and some pieces of the offal.

title: Guisado de Vacca com Tubaras (Beef Stew with Tubaras)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef loin, sliced
- butter, melted
- salt
- broken Indian pepper
- tubaras (a type of vegetable)

## Directions

1. Cut a beef loin into slices; place these in a casserole with melted butter, salt, broken Indian pepper, and take them to the fire, whose heat should be stronger at the time they go to table, turning from time to time.
2. As soon as they are equally browned on both sides, remove them, placing them then on a platter, and pouring over them sauce of tubaras or any other.

title: Guisado de Vitela (Veal Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted veal meat
- butter
- wheat flour
- onion
- water
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- chervil
- lemon juice
- vegetables

## Directions

1. Cut into pieces any portion of roasted veal meat and place them in a casserole with butter, wheat flour, and a chopped onion
2. Let them fry a little, then add a sufficient quantity of water with salt, pepper, parsley, chervil and a little lemon juice
3. Let everything boil over moderate heat for one hour, and then serve with vegetables

title: Guisado de Vitella (Veal Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal meat, roasted and cut into pieces
- butter
- wheat flour
- onion, chopped
- water
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- chervil
- lemon juice
- vegetables

## Directions

1. Cut any portion of roasted veal meat into pieces and place them in a casserole with butter, wheat flour, and a chopped onion
2. Let them fry a little, then add a sufficient quantity of water with salt, pepper, parsley, chervil and a little lemon juice
3. Let everything boil over moderate heat for one hour, then serve with vegetables

title: Guisado de Vitella com Carapicú (Veal Stew with Carapicu)
body:
## Ingredients

- wheat flour
- sugar
- broth or water
- roasted veal meat, cut into small pieces
- raisins, blanched
- carapicu, cleaned
- salt
- clove
- bay leaves
- vinegar
- brazas

## Directions

1. Toast two spoonfuls of wheat flour, then toast a spoonful of sugar, and dissolve everything in four cups of broth or water
2. Add pieces of roasted meat cut into small pieces, a handful of blanched raisins, an equal amount of cleaned carapicu, salt, clove, bay leaves, a glass of vinegar and the necessary sugar
3. Let boil over hot coals for one hour

title: Guisado de Vitella com Chuchús (Veal Stew with Chayote Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh veal meat, cut into small pieces
- pork fat
- chayote squash, peeled and chopped
- water
- wheat or corn flour
- salt
- onion leaves
- pepper
- orange juice
- brazas

## Directions

1. Cut fresh veal meat into small pieces and sauté them in pork fat with chopped peeled chayote squash
2. Add a cup of water, two spoonfuls of wheat or corn flour, salt, onion leaves, pepper, and a little orange juice
3. Let cook covered over hot coals for two hours and serve

title: Guisado de Vitella com Grelos (Veal Stew with Pumpkin Greens)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted rump or loin, cut into small pieces
- wheat flour
- butter
- sugar
- vinegar
- meat broth
- nutmeg
- onion leaves
- pumpkin greens, blanched in salted water
- brazas

## Directions

1. Fry two spoonfuls of wheat flour in a spoonful of butter until it begins to brown
2. Add a spoonful of sugar and another of vinegar, then three cups of meat broth, nutmeg, and onion leaves
3. Let boil a little, then add two or three handfuls of pumpkin greens blanched in salted water and the meat
4. Let everything boil over hot coals for half an hour and serve

title: Guisado de Vitella à Caseira (Home-style Veal Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- fat
- onion leaves
- parsley
- garlic clove
- water
- cornstarch
- vinegar
- caruru, finely chopped
- ora-pro-nobis leaves or okra, sliced
- roasted veal meat, cut into pieces
- cornmeal porridge or cassava flour thickener

## Directions

1. Sauté a little peas in fat with onion leaves, parsley, and a garlic clove
2. Add a few cups of water, a spoonful of cornstarch and another of vinegar
3. Add a handful of finely chopped caruru and some ora-pro-nobis leaves or sliced okra, and pieces of roasted meat
4. Let boil for half an hour and serve with cornmeal porridge or cassava flour thickener

title: Gummed White Gemada (Gemada Branca Gommada)
body:
## Ingredients

- one bottle of milk
- little salt
- four spoons of sugar
- pieces of cinnamon
- cloves
- four ounces of bread crumb
- one spoon of polvilho
- six egg whites

## Directions

1. Boil one bottle of milk with little salt, four spoons of sugar, pieces of cinnamon, and cloves, reducing it to half
2. Add four ounces of bread crumb
3. Boil until the bread dissolves
4. Strain through a sieve
5. Add one spoon of polvilho beaten with six egg whites, mixing the white gradually into the milk
6. Boil again two or three times
7. Place in a bowl and let cool
8. Turn this mass out onto a plate so it comes out whole
9. Cover lightly

title: Hastes de Aipo à Hespanhola (Celery Stalks Spanish Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- celery stalks
- water
- salt
- two ounces of butter
- India pepper
- Spanish sauce
- one bottle of meat broth

## Directions

1. Cut the celery stalks, all the same size, leaving aside the root
2. Boil for twenty-five minutes in water and salt
3. Remove and place in cold water
4. Then allow to drain
5. Place in a casserole with two ounces of butter, India pepper, a portion of Spanish sauce, and one bottle of meat broth
6. Keep near the fire for twenty-five minutes
7. Place on a serving dish, pour the sauce over top
8. Serve

title: Hervilhas Cozidas (Cooked Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- water
- salt
- fat
- onion
- nutmeg
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Boil a portion of peas in little water and salt.
2. Then melt a spoonful of fat, mix with a chopped onion, a little nutmeg and a spoonful of grated bread.
3. Add the cooked peas with the broth, let cook a little more and serve.

title: Hervilhas Guisadas (Braised Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- lard
- parsley
- peas
- water
- salt
- egg yolk
- wine
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry a piece of lard with chopped parsley.
2. Add a portion of peas boiled in water and salt, stir and add a beaten egg yolk mixed with a cup of wine and a spoonful of vinegar.
3. Boil a little more and serve.

title: Hervilhas Guisadas (Stewed Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of bacon
- chopped parsley
- a portion of boiled peas in water and salt
- one egg yolk, beaten
- one cup of wine
- one spoon of vinegar

## Directions

1. Fry a piece of bacon with chopped parsley
2. Add a portion of peas boiled in water and salt
3. Mix and add one egg yolk beaten with one cup of wine and one spoon of vinegar
4. Boil a little more and serve

title: Hervilhas Guisadas com Camarões (Stewed Peas with Shrimp)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of peas
- water and salt
- two spoons of lard
- onion
- chopped parsley
- one clove of garlic, crushed
- half a dozen tomatoes
- pepper and salt
- a portion of raw shelled shrimp

## Directions

1. Boil a portion of peas in little water and salt
2. In the same time, fry two spoons of lard with onion, chopped parsley, one crushed clove of garlic, half a dozen tomatoes, pepper and salt
3. Add the peas with broth and a portion of raw shelled shrimp
4. Let it boil for half an hour and serve

title: Hervilhas Guisadas com Nata (Stewed Peas with Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- one spoon of wheat flour
- one spoon of cow butter
- one chopped onion
- green peas
- a little salt
- two cups of cream or fatty milk

## Directions

1. Brown one spoon of wheat flour with another of cow butter and one chopped onion
2. Add the green peas, a little salt, and two cups of cream or fatty milk
3. Let it boil for half an hour and serve

title: Hervilhas Guisadas com Ovos (Stewed Peas with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- one spoon of lard
- a little salt
- a portion of green peas
- a little water
- sugar
- eggs

## Directions

1. Melt one spoon of lard and a little salt; when hot, brown a portion of green peas
2. Add a little water and sugar
3. Boil, and when boiling, break eggs so they remain whole
4. Let them cook a little more and serve

title: Hervilhas Novas com Leite (New Peas with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of peas
- water and salt
- a little butter
- one glass of fatty milk or milk cream for each bottle of peas
- three spoons of clean sugar
- two egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook in water and salt a portion of peas, and when cooked, drain in a sieve
2. In another place, put in a saucepan a little butter, which melts over the fire
3. Add the peas, adding little by little one glass of fatty milk or milk cream for each bottle of peas
4. Add three spoons of clean sugar, remove from fire and thicken with two egg yolks

title: Hervilhas Refogadas (Sautéed Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- fat
- salt
- green peas
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Melt a spoonful of fat, add a little salt and the scalded and drained green peas.
2. Add a little water and a little clean sugar, boil a little, let dry and serve.

title: Hervilhas Seccas em Polpa (Dried Peas Purée)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of dried peas
- water and salt
- a piece of chopped bacon
- a chopped onion
- bread, cut in small pieces and fried in lard

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of dried peas in water and salt
2. Drain the water and pass through a sieve
