title: Salada de Beterraba Cozida (Cooked Beet Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two beet roots
- salt
- pepper
- sweet oil
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Boil one or two beet roots
2. Peel them and cut into slices
3. Season with salt, pepper, sweet oil and vinegar
4. Serve

title: Salada de Beterraba Crua (Raw Beet Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- Beets
- Salt
- Sweet oil
- Vinegar
- Ground pepper
- Onion
- Nutmeg

## Directions

1. Peel one or two beet roots, grate them and season with salt, sweet oil, vinegar, ground pepper, a finely chopped onion and a portion of grated nutmeg
2. Serve

title: Salada de Beterraba Crua (Raw Beet Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two beet roots
- salt
- sweet oil
- vinegar
- ground pepper
- one onion
- grated nutmeg

## Directions

1. Peel one or two beet roots
2. Grate them and season with salt, sweet oil, vinegar, ground pepper, one finely chopped onion and a portion of grated nutmeg
3. Serve

title: Salada de Cebolas (Onion Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- one root of cooked celery
- vinegar
- sweet oil or melted fat
- salt
- ground pepper
- mustard sauce

## Directions

1. Cut a portion of onions into thin slices
2. Do the same with one cooked and peeled celery root
3. Place in a plate and pour over vinegar, sweet oil or melted fat, salt, ground pepper and mustard sauce
4. Serve

title: Salada de Cebolas Fritas (Fried Onion Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- cow butter
- salt
- pimentos comaris
- mustard sauce
- sugar

## Directions

1. Sauté a portion of chopped onions in cow butter
2. Add salt, pimentos comaris, mustard sauce and a little sugar
3. Serve before the onions begin to brown

title: Salada de Escarola (Endive Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- three or four heads of escarole
- fine salt
- ground pimento da India
- two tablespoons sweet oil or fat
- three tablespoons strong vinegar

## Directions

1. Take three or four heads of escarole and remove the leaves, keeping only the stalks
2. Wash well and cut lengthwise
3. Place in a salad bowl with fine salt, ground pimento da India, two tablespoons of sweet oil or fat and three tablespoons of strong vinegar

title: Salada de Frango (Chicken Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken
- lard
- one dozen preserved sardines
- half plate of cooked and peeled potatoes
- two onions
- a little parsley
- ground pepper
- salt
- half cup of vinegar
- same amount of sweet oil
- beet slices

## Directions

1. Fry a chicken in lard and when cooked, remove the bones and cut the meat into small pieces
2. Do the same with one dozen preserved sardines, half plate of cooked and peeled potatoes, two onions, a little parsley, ground pepper, salt, half cup of vinegar, and the same amount of sweet oil
3. Mix everything and arrange on a plate, garnish with cut beetroot slices, and serve with veal or lamb meat and salads

title: Salada de Jacotupé (Jicama Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two jicama roots
- pimentos comaris
- lemon juice
- salt
- parsley
- chopped onions
- two tablespoons melted fat

## Directions

1. Take one or two jicama roots, cut into slices or grate them
2. Mix with pimentos comaris, lemon juice, salt, parsley and chopped onions
3. Add two tablespoons of hot melted fat
4. Serve with roasts

title: Salada de Palmito (Heart of Palm Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- one heart of palm
- vinegar
- hot fat
- one chopped onion

## Directions

1. Take one heart of palm and chop it finely
2. Scald it and let it drain
3. Season with vinegar, hot fat and one chopped onion
4. Serve

title: Salada de Pepinos (Cucumber Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- four to six cucumbers
- salt
- pimento da India
- sweet oil

## Directions

1. Peel four to six cucumbers
2. Cut into thin slices
3. Season with salt, pimento da India and sweet oil
4. Serve

title: Salada de Pepinos com Nata (Cucumber Salad with Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- four cucumbers
- salt
- vinegar
- milk cream
- one tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Peel and cut four cucumbers into thin slices
2. Soak in salt for four hours
3. Drain the moisture
4. Season again with salt, vinegar, milk cream and one tablespoon of sugar
5. Serve

title: Salada de Pepinos à Allemã (German-Style Cucumber Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- four cucumbers
- salt
- vinegar
- ground pepper
- one chopped onion
- hot fat

## Directions

1. Peel four cucumbers and cut into fine slices
2. Season with salt
3. Let sit for three to four hours
4. Drain and season again with salt, vinegar, ground pepper, one chopped onion and hot fat
5. Serve

title: Salada de Pepinos à Brazileira (Brazilian-Style Cucumber Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- four cucumbers
- four onions
- salt
- pimentos comaris
- lemon juice
- melted fat

## Directions

1. Peel four cucumbers and cut into fine slices
2. Cut four onions equally into slices
3. Mix with salt, pimentos comaris, lemon juice and melted fat
4. Serve

title: Salada de Rabanetes (Radish Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- radishes
- fine salt
- pimento da India in fine powder
- five to six tablespoons strong vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut a portion of radishes into fine slices without peeling them
2. Place in a salad bowl
3. Season with fine salt, pimento da India in fine powder and five to six tablespoons of strong vinegar
4. Serve

title: Salada de Sardinhas (Sardine Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen sardines in escabeche
- one dozen cooked and peeled potatoes
- two onions
- salt
- two hard-boiled egg yolks
- vinegar
- ground pepper
- beet slices
- carrot slices

## Directions

1. Take two dozen sardines in escabeche and remove the backbone
2. Cut the meat into small pieces
3. Cut a dozen cooked and peeled potatoes into pieces, and two onions into pieces
4. Season with salt, two hard-boiled egg yolks crushed in vinegar and ground pepper
5. Place on a plate and decorate with slices of red beets and carrots
6. Serve with roasts of veal and pork

title: Salame de Cabeça de Vitella (Veal Head Salami)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal head
- veal feet
- veal heart
- water
- salt
- eggs
- almonds, chopped
- lemon zest
- clove
- pepper

## Directions

1. Boil the head, feet and heart of veal in salted water, removing the scum
2. When cooked, remove bones from the head and feet and cut all the meat into small pieces
3. Cut the heart into slices the length of a finger and the tongue after removing the skin
4. Add some boiled eggs, chopped almonds, lemon zest, clove, pepper and salt, then place this mixture in a cloth and tie it tightly
5. Thicken the broth to serve with it

title: Salame de Lyão (Lyon Salami)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four pounds of pork meat, preferably lean loin
- Two pounds of beef loin
- Two pounds of fat, cut into pieces
- Ten ounces of salt
- Five drams of ground cayenne pepper
- Five drams of broken cayenne pepper
- Two and a half drams of whole cayenne pepper
- Twelve drams of powdered saltpeter
- Thick intestines
- String
- Salt
- Saltpeter
- Wine dregs
- Thyme
- Sage
- Bay leaf
- Wood ash

## Directions

1. Chop all meat very well and pound it
2. Add the fat cut into pieces and mix
3. Season with salt, ground cayenne pepper, broken cayenne pepper, whole cayenne pepper, and powdered saltpeter
4. Mix all and leave soaking for twenty-four hours
5. Take well-washed thick intestines and introduce the mixture, pounding it with a round bread so no empty spaces remain
6. Tie both ends and wind strong string around the entire length
7. Place the salami in a large tub with salt and a little saltpeter, putting a weight on top
8. Leave for eight days
9. Hang in smoke to dry
10. Tighten the strings well and coat with wine dregs in which thyme, sage and bay leaf have been boiled
11. Allow to dry and roll in a wooden box surrounded and covered with ash
12. Store in a dry and temperate place

title: Salchichão (Sausage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Tender and fatty pork meat
- Parsley
- Chives, chopped
- Thyme
- Marjoram
- Summer savory
- Cloves
- Nutmeg
- Whole cayenne pepper
- Beef intestines
- Salt
- Meat broth

## Directions

1. Chop the pork meat well and mix with parsley, chopped chives, thyme, marjoram, summer savory, cloves, nutmeg and whole cayenne pepper
2. Fill beef intestines with this mixture, tying at both ends
3. Place in smoke for two days
4. Cook in meat broth without salt for three hours
5. For onion sausages, take a quantity of onions, chop them and cook in melted fat
6. When nearly cooked, mix with the chopped meat and fill the intestines as described

title: Salmi de Gallinholas, Marrecos e Saracura (Salmi of Game Birds)
body:
## Ingredients

- three woodcocks
- parsley leaves
- six small onions
- peppers
- butter
- one glass of white wine
- six spoonfuls of Spanish sauce
- three spoonfuls of beef broth
- toasted bread slices

## Directions

1. Roast three woodcocks on a spit and let them cool
2. Carve them as best as possible and place the pieces in a casserole
3. Crush the bones and some remaining bird meat in a mortar with parsley leaves, six small onions and whole peppers
4. In another casserole, put a piece of butter over the fire and add the crushed bones and meat, letting them boil for ten minutes
5. Pour in one glass of white wine, six spoonfuls of Spanish sauce and three spoonfuls of beef broth
6. Reduce everything by half
7. Pass the sauce through a silk sieve and pour it over the woodcock pieces kept hot but not boiling
8. When serving, arrange the pieces on a platter interspersed with slices of toasted bread

title: Sardinhas de Barrica Fritas (Fried Barrel Sardines)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sardines
- Brandy
- Fat
- Peppers
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Take a portion of sardines
2. Put them on a plate with brandy
3. Place over coals
4. When hot, set the brandy on fire
5. When the brandy has finished burning, put some fat in a frying pan and heat well
6. Put the sardines in it
7. Dust with peppers
8. At serving time, squeeze some lemon juice on top

title: Sardinhas de Barrica Refogadas (Braised Barrel Sardines)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sardines
- Fat
- Tapioca flour
- Peppers
- One teacup of vinegar
- Water

## Directions

1. Scald a portion of sardines
2. Put them in cold water and leave to soak for four to six hours
3. Wash and scrape them to clean well
4. Sauté in fat
5. When almost fried, dust with tapioca flour and a little pepper
6. Add one teacup of vinegar and the same amount of water
7. Let boil a little more and serve

title: Sardinhas de Nantes (Nantes Sardines)
body:
## Ingredients

- sardines
- sea water or well-salted water
- cloves
- pepper
- nutmeg
- bay leaves
- good sweet oil

## Directions

1. Clean the fish by removing the scales
2. Scald them with sea water or well-salted water
3. Let them cool in the same water
4. Place them in a pan with cloves, pepper, nutmeg and bay leaves
5. Pour good sweet oil over them so the fish are completely covered
6. Store for later use

title: Sauce for Grilled Meat (Molho para Carne de Grelha)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- chives
- serpol
- parsley
- celery
- beef broth
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Place in a casserole a little butter, a little chives, serpol, parsley, celery; let it heat, add some cups of beef broth and some spoonfuls of vinegar; let it boil for half an hour and serve with meat cooked or roasted on the grill.

title: Sauce for Roasts (Molho para Assados)
body:
## Ingredients

- one chicken breast
- two hard-boiled eggs
- one onion
- four spoonfuls of beef broth
- eight Comarí peppers
- juice of one lemon

## Directions

1. Cut one chicken breast, two hard-boiled eggs, and one onion into very small pieces; add four spoonfuls of beef broth, eight Comarí peppers, crushed with the juice of one lemon, and heat a little to serve with grilled meat.

title: Sauce of the Good Cook (Molho da Boa Cozinheira)
body:
## Ingredients

- dozen mushrooms or champignons, cut
- one carrot
- one celery root
- one onion, cut in slices
- chives
- parsley
- beef broth
- white wine
- bread
- milk
- one garlic clove

## Directions

1. Fry over a moderate fire a dozen cut mushrooms (or champignons), one carrot, one celery root, one onion cut in slices, chives, parsley; then add little by little while stirring one cup of beef broth, and add finally an equal amount of white wine and parsley to taste; let it boil one hour and pass through a silk or hair sieve.
2. On the other side, boil bread in a cup of milk until dry, and pass through a sieve; add this pulp to the broth and serve; some people like to boil with the bread one garlic clove.

title: Seasoned Sauce (Molho Adubado)
body:
## Ingredients

- bacon skins
- beef hand, cut into small pieces
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- chives
- bay leaf
- clove
- onions
- carrots
- turkey, goose or duck
- one cup of white wine
- equal amount of water
- meat sauce substance
- half cup of brandy

## Directions

1. Line the bottom of a casserole with bacon skins and a hand of beef cut into small pieces, salt, pepper, parsley, chives, bay leaf, clove, onions, carrots, and place on them the turkey, goose or duck that you wish to cook; add one cup of white wine, another equal amount of water and of substance for sauce, as well as half a cup of brandy; let it boil over a moderate fire for three to four hours, sealing the lid of the casserole with strips of greased paper so that the vapors do not escape, and serve.

title: Som de Maçãs e Marmelos (Apple and Quince Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled apples
- half pound sugar syrup
- cinnamon
- fennel

## Directions

1. Boil peeled apples in little water until they begin to break apart
2. At this point add half a pound of sugar syrup, a little cinnamon and fennel
3. Boil until it thickens a little
4. Place on a plate and serve cold with roasts

title: Sonhos Fritos (Fried Dreams)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a plate of fine cornmeal
- three cups of boiled milk
- a little salt
- one spoon of sugar
- ten or more eggs
- hot fat

## Directions

1. Scald half a plate of fine cornmeal with three cups of boiled milk, a little salt and one spoon of sugar
2. Mix well
3. Add ten or more eggs to form a soft mixture
4. With a spoon, take small portions and fry in a pan with hot fat
5. Continue until the mixture is finished
6. Cover the fried dreams with sugar and cinnamon
7. Serve for coffee

title: Sonhos Fritos com Queijo (Fried Dreams with Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a bottle of milk
- a little salt
- one spoon of butter
- two spoons of sugar
- four spoons of wheat flour
- one quarter of fresh cheese
- eight or more eggs

## Directions

1. Boil half a bottle of milk with a little salt, one spoon of butter and two spoons of sugar
2. Add four spoons of wheat flour and one quarter of fresh cheese
3. Mix well
4. Add eight or more eggs to form a soft mixture
5. Proceed as previously described

title: Sopa Abreviada (Abbreviated Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of meat
- 1 onion
- 1 parsley root
- a little bacon
- 1/2 cup water
- salt
- bread slices

## Directions

1. Cut 1 pound of meat into small pieces
2. Place them in a pan with an onion, a parsley root, a little bacon, and half a cup of water
3. Let it boil over coals for a quarter hour with the vessel well covered
4. Add 2 jars of water and a little salt
5. Let it boil for one hour
6. Strain the broth over bread slices to serve at table

title: Sopa Allemã com Arroz e Vinho (German Soup with Rice and Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- white wine
- cardamom
- lemon peel
- sugar
- plums

## Directions

1. Cook rice in little water and salt
2. When cooked, add as much white wine as needed to give the soup proper consistency
3. Add cardamom, lemon peel, sugar and plums that have been boiled a little beforehand with the rice
4. Bring to a boil again, then serve

title: Sopa Allemã com Cerveja (German Soup with Beer)
body:
## Ingredients

- hard bread crust
- sugar
- butter
- beer
- two egg yolks
- caraway

## Directions

1. Grate the crust of hard bread and put it with sugar and a little butter in a soup tureen
2. Pour boiled beer over it thickened with two egg yolks and a little caraway

title: Sopa antichlorotica (Antichlorotic Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork
- beef
- manioc
- hominy
- salsify root
- celery
- turnips
- carrots
- egg
- turmeric
- sugar
- Madeira wine

## Directions

1. Put a piece of pork and a piece of beef on the fire to cook
2. Cook manioc, hominy, salsify root, celery, turnips and carrots in another pot with water and salt
3. Remove these ingredients once cooked and add them to the meat broth
4. The meat broth should be skimmed several times and should be finely minced
5. Thicken with a beaten egg mixed with a pinch of Indian turmeric
6. Add sugar and a glass of Madeira wine

title: Sopa antihemorrhoidal (Antihemorrhoidal Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- fat hen
- lettuce
- chicory
- parsley
- sago
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Make broth from a fat hen
2. Once cooked, remove the meat and fat
3. Add a handful of lettuce, chicory, parsley, a little sago and a spoonful of vinegar
4. Boil a little longer
5. Serve at table

title: Sopa Curraleira (Ranch-Style Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- four to six spoonfuls of fine cornmeal
- two bottles of hot water
- salt
- a little parsley

## Directions

1. Fry four to six spoonfuls of fine cornmeal in butter until light coffee-colored
2. Add two bottles of hot water
3. Add necessary salt and a little parsley
4. Let boil

title: Sopa Cuyabana (Cuyaban Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- guaraná
- hot water
- one quarter pound of sugar
- one bottle of beer
- one cup of white wine
- slices of lemon
- dried rusks

## Directions

1. Grate some guaraná and mix with one bottle of hot water and one quarter pound of sugar
2. After cooling, add one bottle of beer, one cup of white wine, slices of lemon and dried rusks that have been pounded and toasted
3. Serve cold as a refreshment

title: Sopa da Russia ou Quass (Russian Soup or Quass)
body:
## Ingredients

- wheat flour
- sugar
- hot water
- warm water
- whey from milk
- salt
- potatoes
- pieces of scalded cod
- butter

## Directions

1. Knead a little wheat flour with sugar and hot water
2. Put this dough in a warm place for three to four days until it ferments
3. At night add more flour and warm water, leaving it in the same warm place
4. The next day combine this dough with whey from milk and necessary salt, some potatoes, pieces of scalded cod, one spoon of butter and let boil until the potatoes are well cooked
5. Finally add a little sugar
6. If the soup is not sour enough, add a little vinegar

title: Sopa de Abóbora (Squash Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- abóbora (squash)
- agua (water)
- sal (salt)
- leite (milk)
- assucar (sugar)
- pedaços de biscoutos (pieces of biscuits)

## Directions

1. Descasca-se a abóbora
2. Tira-ge-lhe o miolo
3. Cortada em pedaços, coze-se em agua e sal
4. Cozida que seja, ajuntão-se-lhe leite, um pouco de assucar e pedaços de biscoutos
5. Deixando-a ferver mais um pouco, vai á mesa

title: Sopa de Abóbora d'Agua (Water Squash Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma abóbora d'agua (a water squash)
- gordura (fat)
- folhas de salsa (parsley leaves)
- cebola (onion)
- algumas pimentas (some peppers)
- tomates (tomatoes)
- agua (water)
- sal (salt)
- lombo de porco assado (roasted pork loin)

## Directions

1. Toma-se uma abóbora d'agua
2. Descascada e limpa, é cortada em pedacinhos quadrados
3. Quando estão cozidos, são tirados da vasilha onde fervem
4. Postos a escorrer a agua que contêm, são depois refogados em gordura, contendo folhas de salsa, cebola, algumas pimentas e tomates
5. Ajunta-se-lhes mais agua, sal e lombo de porco assado e cortado em pedaços
6. Ferve-se tudo por mais um pouco, para poder ir á mesa

title: Sopa de Aletria com Hervilhas (Vermicelli Soup with Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- turnips
- onions
- celery
- garlic
- clove from India
- beef broth
- vermicelli
- peas

## Directions

1. Put in beef broth a portion of carrots, turnips, onions, celery, garlic and some clove heads from India
2. Let it cook for two hours
3. Strain through a cloth and add a portion of vermicelli scalded in hot water and a portion of peas cooked only in water

title: Sopa de Alfaces com Hervilhas (Lettuce Soup with Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- dozen lettuce plants
- water
- pepper
- salt
- parsley
- clove
- bay leaves
- onion
- peas
- meat broth
- bread

## Directions

1. Wash a dozen lettuce plants, let them drain well, and after splitting them in half without removing the leaves, place them carefully in a casserole containing three to four cups of water with pepper and salt
2. Let them boil on moderate heat for two hours, then add parsley, clove, bay leaves, onion
3. When this mixture is dry, pour it into a tureen containing fresh peas cooked in meat broth
4. Finally add toasted bread cut into pieces and pour meat broth over them

title: Sopa de Ameixas (Plum Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- ameixas (plums)
- casquinhas de limão (lemon peels)
- assucar (sugar)
- fatias de pão torrado (toasted bread slices)

## Directions

1. Fervem-se as ameixas com casquinhas de limão
2. Quando estiverem bem molles, passão-se por peneira
3. Ajunta-se-lhes um pouco de assucar
4. Deitão-se sobre fatias de pão torrado

title: Sopa de Ameixas (Plum Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- plums
- lemon peel
- sugar
- toasted bread slices

## Directions

1. Boil plums with lemon peel
2. When very soft, pass through a sieve
3. Add a little sugar and pour over toasted bread slices

title: Sopa de Amoras (Berry Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- blackberries
- white wine
- sugar
- cinnamon
- toasted bread slices

## Directions

1. Choose and wash a portion of blackberries and boil with white wine, sugar, and cinnamon until they fall apart
2. Pour into a tureen over toasted bread slices and serve

title: Sopa de Amoras (Blackberry Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- amoras (blackberries)
- vinho branco (white wine)
- assucar (sugar)
- canella (cinnamon)
- fatias de pão torrado (toasted bread slices)

## Directions

1. Escolhe-se e lava-se uma porção de amoras
2. Põem-se a ferver com vinho branco, assucar e canella até se desmanchar
3. Deita-se n'uma terrina sobre fatias de pão torrado
4. Manda-se á mesa

title: Sopa de Arroz com Cerveja (Rice and Beer Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one full cup of rice
- one bottle of water
- one bottle of beer
- two spoons of sugar
- raisins
- one egg yolk
- one cup of white wine

## Directions

1. Cook one full cup of rice with one bottle of water, one bottle of beer and two spoons of sugar
2. Finally add some raisins, one well-beaten egg yolk and one cup of white wine, then serve

title: Sopa de Arroz com Leite de Amendoas (Rice Soup with Almond Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- lemon peel
- bay leaves
- 1 quarter pound sweet almonds, shelled
- 1 half quarter pound sugar
- 1 half bottle water

## Directions

1. Cook rice in water with very little salt
2. Add a little lemon peel and bay leaves, being careful not to heat too strongly
3. Pound one quarter pound of shelled sweet almonds with half a quarter pound of sugar
4. Add water gradually, about half a bottle
5. Strain by pressing, and add this milk to the rice soup
6. Add more sugar if necessary

title: Sopa de Arroz com Tomates (Rice and Tomato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of white rice
- meat broth
- pulp of ten tomatoes
- a little butter

## Directions

1. Cook half a pound of white rice in meat broth
2. When sufficiently cooked, add the pulp of ten tomatoes, fried a little in butter, passed through a sieve, and cooked in a little broth
3. Let everything boil for another half hour and serve

title: Sopa de Arroz com Vinho (Rice and Wine Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- white wine
- lemon peel
- sugar
- raisins

## Directions

1. Cook rice in water until dry
2. Add as much white wine as needed, lemon peel, sugar and some raisins
3. Let it boil for a short time, then serve

title: Sopa de Arroz de Leite (Rice and Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- milk
- salt
- sugar
- fennel

## Directions

1. Cook rice in water
2. Pour the cooked rice into boiled milk
3. Add a little salt, sugar, and fennel
4. Serve

title: Sopa de Azedas (Sorrel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sorrel
- lettuce plant
- chervil
- fat
- meat broth
- bread

## Directions

1. Take a portion of sorrel, a lettuce plant, and a little finely chopped chervil
2. Sauté all this in a little fat
3. Then pass this mixture through a sieve so that no stalks or fibers remain
4. Pour over this sieved mixture a portion of meat broth of whatever meat is available
5. Let it boil for half an hour
6. After removing the fat, pour it over toasted bread and serve

title: Sopa de Azedas (Sorrel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of sorrel
- one head of lettuce
- a little chervil, finely chopped
- a little fat
- a portion of meat broth

## Directions

1. Sauté all of this in a little fat
2. Pass this mixture through a sieve so that no stalks or fibers remain
3. Pour a portion of any available meat broth over this sieved mixture
4. Bring to a boil for half an hour
5. Remove the fat
6. Pour over toasted bread slices and serve

title: Sopa de Batatas (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma ou duas duzias de batatas inglezas (one or two dozen English potatoes)
- agua (water)
- sal (salt)
- uma colher de farinha de trigo ou duas de fubá mimoso (a spoon of wheat flour or two of fine cornmeal)
- uma cebola bem picada (a well-chopped onion)
- uma colher de manteiga (a spoon of butter)
- algumas pimentas (some peppers)
- folhos de salsa (parsley leaves)
- folhos de cebola (onion leaves)

## Directions

1. Descasque-se uma ou duas duzias de batatas inglezas
2. Ferva-se em agua e sal até começar a esmagar-se
3. Frija-se depois uma colher de farinha de trigo ou duas de fubá mimoso, uma cebola bem picada em uma colher de manteiga
4. Deite-se-lhe por cima o caldo das batatas
5. Ajuntando-lhes algumas pimentas, folhos de salsa e de cebola
6. Deixa-se tudo isto ferver por mais um pouco, para ir á mesa

title: Sopa de Bolinhos (Dumpling Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- wheat flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Make a dough with an egg and wheat flour
2. Cut this dough into small pieces
3. Fry the pieces in butter
4. Serve these pieces by cooking them with meat broth a short time before serving at table

title: Sopa de Bolos de Batatas (Potato Ball Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- 3 or 4 egg yolks
- a little butter
- meat broth

## Directions

1. Cook, peel, and grate some small potatoes
2. Add to the potato mixture 3 or 4 egg yolks and a little butter
3. Form small balls
4. Cook the balls in meat broth a short time before serving at table

title: Sopa de Cajús (Cashew Apple Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cajúa (cashew apples)
- agua (water)
- talhadas de limão (lemon slices)
- assucar (sugar)
- vinho branco (white wine)
- fatias de pão (bread slices)

## Directions

1. Toma-se uma porção de cajúa que se cortão em pedaços
2. Fervem-se um pouco em agua com talhadas de limão e assucar
3. Coa-se
4. Ajuntão-se-lhe outro tanto de vinho branco, umas talhadas de limão e fatias de pão
5. Esta sopa come-se fria

title: Sopa de Camarão (Shrimp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- shrimp
- water
- salt
- eggs
- parsley

## Directions

1. Boil the shrimp in water and salt
2. After an hour, when large bubbles appear on the surface, slowly drip the contents of two or four eggs without stirring, so that as these drops fall into the broth they coagulate and form small pieces
3. Add a parsley leaf and serve

title: Sopa de Camarões (Shrimp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- shrimp
- fat
- water
- onion leaves
- parsley
- rice or bread toasts

## Directions

1. Fry some shrimp in a little fat
2. Add water afterwards and let them boil for about an hour
3. Add onion leaves and parsley
4. Pour into a tureen containing cooked rice or bread toasts

title: Sopa de Campeiro (Countryman's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef lungs
- salt
- herbs
- wheat flour
- egg yolks
- nutmeg (optional)

## Directions

1. Wash the beef lungs and cut them into pieces
2. Cook the pieces in water with salt and herbs
3. Strain the broth
4. Add wheat flour, egg yolks, and if desired, a little nutmeg

title: Sopa de Cangiquinha (Corn Grits Soup with Egg White)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of corn grits
- four egg yolks
- half a bottle of white wine
- sugar
- cinnamon
- egg whites
- water

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of corn grits
2. Beat four egg yolks with half a bottle of white wine
3. Add to the corn grits with sugar and cinnamon
4. Beat egg whites separately until they form a compact mass
5. Drop spoonfuls of beaten egg white into boiling water in small pearls
6. Remove the cooked egg white snow and set aside
7. Place the cooked egg white on top of the corn grits soup as garnish
8. Sprinkle with ground cinnamon

title: Sopa de Cangiquinha (Corn Grits Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of corn grits
- ground peanuts
- water
- sugar
- grated cheese
- a little anise herb

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of corn grits as needed
2. Take ground peanuts and mix with water
3. Strain and squeeze the mixture
4. Repeat the straining in fresh water until the water no longer comes out milky
5. Add this peanut milk to the corn grits
6. Mix in sugar, grated cheese, and a little anise herb

title: Sopa de Cangiquinha do Lambary (Lambary Corn Grits Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- corn grits
- salt
- butter
- two egg yolks
- bread, fried
- raisins

## Directions

1. Boil corn grits until quite thick
2. Strain through a sieve
3. Season with salt and butter
4. Add two beaten egg yolks
5. Add pieces of fried bread and some raisins

title: Sopa de Capão (Capon Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 capon
- a piece of veal
- a portion of beef liver
- salt
- large onions
- cooked capon meat
- wheat flour
- butter
- egg yolks
- sugar
- peppers

## Directions

1. Make a strong broth with the capon, veal, and beef liver
2. Add necessary salt
3. Take large onions and let them simmer a little in the broth
4. Remove the centers of the onions
5. Fill the onion cavities with a stuffing made from cooked and minced capon meat, wheat flour, butter, egg yolks, sugar, and peppers
6. Let the prepared onions simmer in a little broth

title: Sopa de Carne de Vacca (Beef Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a good piece of beef, well fatty or containing bones
- cold water
- salt
- cabbage leaves
- parsley
- thyme
- onions
- macaroni, vermicelli or sago (optional)
- bread toasted or cooked rice

## Directions

1. Choose a good piece of beef that is well fatty or contains bones
2. Break the bones into small pieces and place everything with cold water and salt on the fire
3. Carefully skim the froth several times
4. After cooking for two or three hours, strain it
5. Add cabbage leaves, parsley, thyme and onions tied in a cloth which should be removed when serving
6. Add macaroni, vermicelli or sago (if desired) after these have been soaked in cold water for about one hour
7. Pour the clear broth over toasted bread or cooked rice when serving at table

title: Sopa de Castanhas ou de Pinhões (Chestnut or Pine Nut Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- fifty chestnuts or pine nuts
- water
- beef or hen broth
- butter
- sugar
- bread
- onion

## Directions

1. After peeling fifty chestnuts, put them to boil in a little water to facilitate removing the skin
2. Then boil in beef or hen broth, adding a little butter and sugar
3. After two hours, pour the broth with the chestnuts into a tureen already containing toasted bread
4. Previously add to the broth a fried onion and butter
5. The same way is made the pine nut soup

title: Sopa de Caça (Game Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- three pounds of beef
- four partridges, quails, or capons
- a pound and a half of calf's feet
- one guan
- three carrots
- two onions
- one celery root
- two cloves
- a little fennel
- salt and water
- three quails or capons
- one cup of bread crumb soaked in meat broth

## Directions

1. Put three pounds of beef, four partridges or capons, a pound and a half of calf's feet, one guan, three carrots, two onions, one celery root, two cloves, and a little fennel in a pot with salt and water to make a broth for the soup
2. On the other hand, roast three quails or capons and pound them with the bones in a mortar
3. Mix them with one cup of bread crumb that has been soaked in meat broth
4. Pass this mixture through a sieve, adding a little broth so it becomes thin, and after straining, place over low heat, taking care not to let it boil
5. Soak some bread slices in the broth that is already ready
6. Place these slices at the bottom of a tureen, cover them with the quail pulp, and finally pour the broth

title: Sopa de Cebola à Mineira (Minas-Style Onion Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or two onions, finely chopped
- butter
- one spoonful of wheat flour or cornmeal
- hot water
- cornmeal or bread slices

## Directions

1. Fry finely chopped onions in a spoonful of butter until they begin to color
2. Add one spoonful of wheat flour or cornmeal and continue frying until cinnamon-colored
3. Add hot water as needed
4. Boil briefly
5. Pour this broth over cornmeal or bread slices

title: Sopa de Cebolas (Onion Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- two or three onions, finely chopped
- one spoonful of wheat flour
- water
- salt
- bread, toasted

## Directions

1. Fry two or three finely chopped onions in butter until they begin to brown
2. Add one spoonful of wheat flour and continue frying until the onions are browned
3. Gradually add the necessary water and salt
4. Pour the soup into a tureen with toasted bread

title: Sopa de Cenouras (Carrot Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- tender carrots
- water
- beef broth
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take a portion of tender carrots, wash and scald them in hot water
2. After drying and cutting them into long thin slices, cook them in beef broth with a little sugar

title: Sopa de Cevadinha (Barley Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- water
- roots
- herbs
- salt
- 1 cup barley per jar of broth

## Directions

1. Bring the meat to a boil in as much water as is needed
2. Add roots, herbs, and salt
3. Remove the scum from time to time
4. When cooked, strain it
5. Add one cup of barley for each jar of broth
6. Let it boil for one more hour and serve at table

title: Sopa de Colbert (Colbert Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- manteiga (butter)
- hervilhas (peas)
- vagens (beans)
- farinha de trigo (wheat flour)
- agua (water)
- sal (salt)
- ovos inteiros (whole eggs)

## Directions

1. Afogão-se em manteiga hervilhas e vagens, cortadas em tiras, com um pouco de farinha de trigo
2. Ajuntão-se á agua e ao sal
3. Antes de pôl-a na terrina, ajuntam-se ovos inteiros, tendo-se o cuidado de não esmigalhal-os
4. Para este fim quebram-se os ovos em uma espumadeira que se introduz na sopa fervendo em aljoares
5. Retira-se alguns instantes depois

title: Sopa de Couveflor (Cauliflower Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one head of cauliflower, finely chopped
- meat broth
- a little salt
- parsley
- two heads of onions or cauliflower
- fried bread slices

## Directions

1. Blanch one finely chopped head of cauliflower
2. After cooling and draining, cook meat broth with a little salt and parsley
3. When ready to serve, pour this broth into a tureen that already contains two blanched heads of onions or cauliflower, kept whole and separate, over fried bread slices
4. Serve while hot

title: Sopa de Espargos (Asparagus Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of asparagus
- toasted bread slices
- a little sugar
- a portion of meat broth

## Directions

1. Blanch a portion of asparagus
2. Let cool and drain, then dry with a towel
3. Place in a tureen with toasted bread slices and a little sugar
4. Pour a portion of meat broth over it, enough to make soup
5. Serve hot

title: Sopa de Família (Family Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- bacon
- beef
- water
- potatoes
- cabbage
- squash pieces
- cassava roots
- ears of green corn
- parsley leaves
- salt

## Directions

1. Place in a pot bacon, beef, and sufficient water
2. Remove the scum from time to time
3. When these are cooked, add some potatoes, cabbage, squash pieces, cassava roots, ears of green corn, parsley leaves, and salt to taste
4. Let everything cook for half an hour more
5. Pour the broth over bread slices or cooked rice and serve the cooked meat in a separate dish

title: Sopa de Favas (Fava Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- favas novas (new fava beans)
- vagens novas picadas (chopped new bean pods)
- cebola (onion)
- salsa (parsley)
- sal (salt)
- manteiga (butter)
- biscoutos picados e torrados (chopped and toasted biscuits)

## Directions

1. Cozão-se favas novas
2. Quando estiverem molles, passem-se por uma peneira
3. Por outro lado, cozão-se vagens novas picadas
4. Depois de estarem cozidas, ajuntem-se-lhes cebola, salsa, sal e manteiga
5. Misturem-se com a massa das favas
6. Deixando-se ferver um pouco, deite-se em uma terrina contendo já biscoutos picados e torrados

title: Sopa de Feijão Branco (White Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- feijão branco (white beans)
- vinagre (vinegar)
- assucar (sugar)
- polvilho (tapioca starch)
- assucar queimado (burnt sugar)

## Directions

1. Cozinhe-se o feijão, como o feijão miudo
2. Tempere-se da mesma maneira, ou misture-se com vinagre, assucar, polvilho e um pouco de assucar queimado para dar côr

title: Sopa de Feijão Miudo (Small Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- feijão miudo (small beans)
- agua fria (cold water)
- hervas (herbs)
- um pedaço de toucinho (a piece of bacon)
- polvilho (tapioca starch)
- vinagre (vinegar)

## Directions

1. Ponha-se o feijão miudo com agua fria sobre o fogo
2. Logo que esteja cozido, ponha-se sobre umas brazas por espaço de uma hora, afim de ficar molle
3. Depois ajuntão-se-lhe hervas, um pedaço de toucinho e deixa-se ferver
4. Finalmente, engrossa-se o caldo com uma colher de polvilho desfeita em agua fria
5. Ajuntão-se-lhe duas colheres de vinagre

title: Sopa de Feijão Preto (Black Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- feijão preto (black beans)
- gordura (fat)
- alho (garlic)
- cebola (onion)
- sal (salt)
- salsa (parsley)
- agua quente (hot water)
- biscoutos de polvilho cortados em pedaços (pieces of tapioca starch biscuits)
- manteiga (butter)
- pão ou roscas seccas (bread or dry bread rolls)
- assucar (sugar)
- vinagre (vinegar)

## Directions

1. Depois de estar o feijão cozido e temperado com gordura, alho, cebola, sal e salsa
2. Meia hora antes de pôr á mesa, ajunta-se-lhe duas vezes tanto de agua quente, quanto tem de feijão temperado
3. Deixa-se ferver uma vez
4. Deita-se o caldo sobre biscoutos de polvilho cortados em pedaços e fritos na manteiga, ou sobre pão ou roscas seccas
5. Ajuntão-se-lhe duas colheres de assucar e quatro de vinagre

title: Sopa de Fígado (Liver Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of cooked liver
- 1/2 jar white wine
- 2 jars water
- lemon peels
- cinnamon
- raisins
- sugar
- salt
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Take a piece of cooked liver and pass it through a sieve by repeated friction
2. Add to it half a jar of white wine, 2 jars of water, lemon peels, cinnamon, raisins, sugar, and a little salt
3. Bring it to a boil
4. Thicken it with some egg yolks

title: Sopa de Galinha (Hen Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 fat hen
- 3 spoons of fat
- 8 jars of water
- parsley
- onion leaves
- 1 clove of garlic
- peppers from India
- corn flour or cassava flour

## Directions

1. Clean the hen and cut it into pieces
2. Fry it in 3 spoons of fat
3. Add 8 jars of water
4. Add parsley, onion leaves, a clove of garlic, and peppers from India
5. Pour the broth over corn flour or cassava flour placed in a dish and mix everything well
6. Serve the hen meat in a separate plate

title: Sopa de Hervilhas (Pea Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- farinha de trigo (wheat flour)
- manteiga (butter)
- hervilhas novas (new peas)
- algumas cenouras (some carrots)
- frango picado (chopped chicken)
- agua (water)

## Directions

1. Frige-se um pouco de farinha de trigo em manteiga
2. Ajuntão-se-lhe hervilhas novas, algumas cenouras, frango picado e água
3. Deixando-se cozer quanto basta para se poderem levar á mesa

title: Sopa de Invernada (Winter Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- meat
- herbs
- roots
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 spoon cornstarch
- 2 spoons corn flour

## Directions

1. Cook the meat with the herbs and roots desired
2. Strain it and return the broth to the fire
3. When it is already boiling, gradually add a mixture made of 3 eggs, half a spoon of cornstarch, and 2 spoons of corn flour
4. Let it boil until the mixture rises to the surface of the broth and serve at table

title: Sopa de Jacob (Jacob's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- lentilhas (lentils)
- assucar (sugar)
- vinagre (vinegar)
- uma cebola (an onion)

## Directions

1. Cozão-se lentilhas
2. Passe-se metade por uma peneira, que depois se ajunta á outra metade
3. Temperem-se com assucar, vinagre, e uma cebola talhada
4. Dê-se-lhes mais uma fervura

title: Sopa de Jacob (Jacob's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- sugar
- vinegar
- onion

## Directions

1. Cook the lentils
2. Pass half of them through a sieve
3. Mix the sieved lentils with the other half
4. Season with sugar, vinegar, and a sliced onion
5. Give it one more boil

title: Sopa de Laranjas (Orange Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- dez ou doze laranjas (ten or twelve oranges)
- agua (water)
- assucar (sugar)
- fatias de pão torrado (toasted bread slices)
- rodellas de limão gallego (Galician lemon slices)

## Directions

1. Descasquem-se as laranjas
2. Fervão-se em duas garrafas de agua com um pouco de assucar
3. Coem-se
4. Deita-se o caldo n'uma terrina, sobre fatias de pão torrado e rodellas de limão gallego

title: Sopa de Leite (Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- salt
- sugar
- 4 egg yolks
- bread slices

## Directions

1. Boil milk with a little salt and sugar
2. When serving, add four beaten egg yolks and keep on the fire, stirring constantly until nearly boiling
3. Pour the soup into a tureen over bread slices and serve

title: Sopa de Leite com Arroz (Milk Soup with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 full tablespoons rice
- 1 bottle milk
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 egg yolks
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Wash four tablespoons of rice and put in a bottle of milk
2. Let boil for one hour
3. Then add two tablespoons of sugar, two beaten egg yolks, and a little cinnamon
4. Remove from heat

title: Sopa de Leite com Cebolas (Milk Soup with Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- butter
- milk
- salt
- pepper
- polvilho biscuits
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Fry onions cut into rounds in butter and pour into milk
2. When they begin to brown, add salt and a little pepper
3. Bring to a boil and pour over polvilho biscuits that have been chopped and fried in butter

title: Sopa de Leite Queimado (Burnt Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- sugar
- cinnamon
- egg yolks
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Boil milk with sugar, cinnamon, and egg yolks
2. Pour everything into a dish and cover with beaten egg whites boiled in water
3. Sprinkle with plenty of sugar
4. Heat a saber in the fire and burn the sugar lengthwise, making different figures

title: Sopa de Lentilhas (Lentil Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma porção de lentilhas (a portion of lentils)
- agua (water)

## Directions

1. Coze-se uma porção de lentilhas, depois de bem lavadas e escolhidas
2. Logo que estejão cozidas, passão-se a metade por uma peneira, esmigalhando-as
3. A estas ajuntão-se então as lentilhas não pisadas e o caldo

title: Sopa de lentilhas (Lentil Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- meat broth
- potatoes
- salsify root

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of lentils after washing and selecting them well
2. Once cooked, pass half of them through a sieve, crumbling them
3. Add the unsieved lentils to the sieved ones
4. Add meat broth as needed
5. Add potatoes and salsify root
6. Cook until done

title: Sopa de Limão (Lemon Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma rosca secca (a dry bread roll)
- manteiga (butter)
- um copo de vinho branco ou tincto (a glass of white or red wine)
- assucar (sugar)
- fatias de um limão gallego (slices of a Galician lemon)

## Directions

1. Ferve-se uma rosca secca e um pouco de manteiga até desfazer-se a rosca
2. Coa-se por uma peneira
3. Ajuntão-se-lhe um copo de vinho branco ou tincto, assucar e as fatias de um limão gallego
4. Torna-se-lhe a dar uma fervura
5. Serve-se

title: Sopa de Lombo de Porco (Pork Loin Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh pork loin
- salt
- garlic
- red wine
- fat
- bread slices
- Minas cheese
- sugar
- 4 or 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Place a fresh pork loin in a ceramic vessel seasoned with salt, garlic, and a little red wine
2. Leave it in this state for 12 hours
3. Then roast it in the oven or on a grill
4. After this, cut it into thin slices and place them in layers in a fat-greased pan, beginning with a layer of meat slices at the bottom, then a layer of bread slices above it, and above this last one a layer of grated Minas cheese, and so on until the vessel is filled
5. The last layer should be of grated bread crusts, over which sugar is sprinkled and 4 or 6 beaten eggs are poured over everything
6. Place the pan in the oven to cook the soup

title: Sopa de Lord-Mayor (Lord Mayor's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pig ears
- 4 pig feet
- 8 jars water
- parsley
- celery
- onions
- cloves
- 1/2 pound butter
- wheat flour
- herbs (parsley, chervil, chives, etc.)
- 1/2 small spoon paprika
- 1/2 jar Port or Madeira wine
- 3 dozen slices of fried beef

## Directions

1. Cook 4 pig ears and 4 pig feet slowly over gentle fire for 4 to 6 hours in 8 jars of water
2. Add a bunch of parsley, celery, and onions garnished with cloves
3. Remove from the fire, strain, and let cool
4. When cool, remove all the fat and cut the ears and feet, after removing the bones, into small pieces
5. In another pan, melt half a pound of butter and add as much wheat flour as is necessary to absorb the butter, keeping it at the heat of the fire for 10 or 12 minutes and stirring constantly
6. Gradually add the broth, letting the mixture boil always before adding new portions of broth
7. When the broth is boiling over, add the chopped ears and feet, 2 spoons of chopped herbs such as parsley, chervil, chives, etc.; half a small spoon of paprika, and half a jar of Port or Madeira wine
8. Remove this broth from the fire and pour it into a tureen, adding 3 dozen slices of fried beef

title: Sopa de Marmelos (Quince Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma porção de arroz (a portion of rice)
- alguns marmelos descascados e descarogados (some peeled and cored quinces)
- um limão gallego partido em fatias (a Galician lemon cut into slices)
- um pouco de assucar (a little sugar)
- canela (cinnamon)

## Directions

1. Ferve-se em agua uma porção de arroz com alguns marmelos descascados e descarogados, um limão gallego partido em fatias, um pouco de assucar e canela
2. Quando o arroz ficar cozido e os marmelos principiarem a se desfazer, preparar-se-ha a sopa

title: Sopa de Maçãs (Apple Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma porção de maçãs (a portion of apples)
- agua (water)
- assucar (sugar)
- casquinhas de limão (lemon peels)
- a gema de um ovo (the yolk of an egg)
- algumas passas (some raisins)

## Directions

1. Parte-se uma porção de maçãs
2. Ferve-se em agua com assucar e casquinhas de limão
3. Passa-se por uma peneira
4. Ajunta-se-lhe a gema de um ovo e algumas passas

title: Sopa de Maçãs Outra (Another Apple Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma porção de canguinha (a portion of canguinha)
- algumas maçãs descascadas (some peeled apples)
- assucar (sugar)
- canella (cinnamon)

## Directions

1. Ferve-se em agua uma porção de canguinha até estar cozida
2. Ajuntão-se-lhe algumas maçãs descascadas, assucar e canella
3. Deixa-se ferver até que as maçãs comecem a se desfazer
4. Tira-se então do fogo para servir

title: Sopa de Minas (Minas Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- sugar
- eggs
- cinnamon
- raisins
- manioc flour

## Directions

1. Boil a portion of milk with sugar
2. Add beaten eggs (white and yolk), cinnamon, and raisins
3. Pour this mixture over a little manioc flour

title: Sopa de Ostras (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds of fresh fish
- water
- salt
- four dozen oysters
- bread toasts

## Directions

1. Cook two pounds of fresh fish in four bottles of water and salt
2. When well cooked, strain without pressing
3. Add four dozen pounded oysters
4. Let boil for another half hour and pour over bread toasts

title: Sopa de Ovos Assados (Baked Eggs Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one or more loaves of bread, sliced
- milk
- butter
- sugar
- cinnamon
- ten to twelve eggs

## Directions

1. Soak bread slices in a little milk
2. Butter a pan and place a layer of bread slices at the bottom
3. Cover with a layer of sugar and ground cinnamon
4. Add another layer of bread slices
5. Continue alternating layers, with the last layer being sugar and butter
6. Pour ten to twelve beaten eggs over everything
7. Cover the pan and place in a hot oven
8. Bake for half an hour

title: Sopa de Ovos Atolados (Drowned Egg Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup strained meat broth
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Take a cup of strained meat broth and beat 3 eggs into it

title: Sopa de Ovos Atolados (Egg Drop Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of strained meat broth
- three eggs
- dried rusks, ground
- salt
- carrots
- parsley

## Directions

1. Take one cup of meat broth strained, and beat three eggs in it
2. Pour this cup of broth into the larger portion of broth intended for the soup
3. Add a portion of ground dried rusks, necessary salt, carrots and parsley
4. Let it boil for half an hour more, then serve at table

title: Sopa de Palmitos (Palm Heart Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- palm heart, finely chopped and blanched
- fat
- salt
- tomatoes
- a little fine cornmeal
- water
- arrowroot
- cold water

## Directions

1. Blanch finely chopped palm heart in hot water
2. Sauté in fat with salt, tomatoes, and a little fine cornmeal
3. Add necessary water
4. Dissolve one spoonful of arrowroot in two cups of cold water
5. Stir the soup and gradually add the arrowroot water little by little

title: Sopa de Palmitos com Leite (Palmetto and Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- palmetto
- salt
- fat
- water
- milk
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Chop, blanch, and sauté the palmetto with a little salt and fat
2. Cook in a little water until done
3. When the water is almost dry, add a bottle of milk cooked with two tablespoons of sugar and two egg yolks

title: Sopa de Peixe (Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- water
- salt
- onion leaves
- new peas (optional)
- cassava flour or cornmeal

## Directions

1. Cook the fish in water and salt with onion leaves, and if desired, some new peas, for one hour
2. Pour the broth into a tureen already containing cassava flour or cornmeal

title: Sopa de Peixe (Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- small fish
- fat
- water
- salt
- parsley leaves
- onions
- Indian pepper
- egg yolks
- cassava flour or cornmeal

## Directions

1. Fry small fish first in a little fat
2. Make them boil afterwards in water seasoned with salt, parsley leaves, onions and Indian pepper
3. After boiling, thicken the broth by adding two beaten egg yolks that have been first mixed in a little of the broth
4. Let boil for another half hour, then pour the broth over cassava flour or cornmeal

title: Sopa de Peixe com Arroz (Fish Soup with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- peas
- green beans
- carrots
- onions
- parsley
- celery
- tomatoes
- butter
- fish broth or vinegar

## Directions

1. Put rice to cook with some peas, green beans, carrots, onions, parsley, celery and tomatoes
2. When everything is cooked, add a little butter and let boil over a low fire until almost dry
3. Add fresh fish broth, or then one or two spoons of vinegar

title: Sopa de Peixe à Caiapó (Fish Soup Caiapó-style)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef
- roots
- parsley
- carrots
- celery
- small potatoes
- apples
- fish portions
- wheat flour
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Boil beef with plenty of roots, parsley, carrots, celery, small potatoes and some apples cut in pieces
2. When almost cooked, add fish portions and let them cook more
3. Strain through a sieve and thicken the broth with wheat flour boiled in vinegar

title: Sopa de pepinos (Cucumber Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- salt
- meat broth or hot water
- onion
- pepper
- vinegar
- biscuits

## Directions

1. Peel some cucumbers and remove the inner flesh
2. Cut them into thin slices
3. Cook them in coals with a little salt for nine minutes
4. Remove and dry them
5. Fry them in lard
6. Add meat broth or hot water, onion, pepper, a little vinegar and biscuits
7. Let them boil a little longer
8. Remove from heat

title: Sopa de Pepinos com Leite (Cucumber and Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- water
- salt
- milk
- sugar
- manioc flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel, clean, and cut cucumbers into pieces
2. Let boil in water and salt
3. When cooked, remove from water and mash, passing through a sieve
4. Add boiled milk with sugar or salt
5. Pour this broth into manioc flour fried in butter, stirring constantly

title: Sopa de Petropolis (Petropolis Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg yolks
- 4 or 5 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt
- 1 bottle water
- 1 half bottle rich milk
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- cinnamon
- fennel

## Directions

1. Knead the yolk of two eggs with four or five tablespoons of sugar, a tablespoon of butter, and salt
2. Add a bottle of water, stirring constantly
3. Let everything boil a little
4. Finally, add half a bottle of rich milk, two tablespoons of sugar, a little cinnamon and fennel
5. Serve

title: Sopa de Polpas de Tomates (Tomato Pulp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- forty tomatoes
- one pound of salted pork meat
- four onions
- parsley
- one clove
- a little pepper
- a quarter pound of good butter
- a portion of meat
- the crumb of one loaf of bread
- bread slices fried in butter

## Directions

1. Press forty tomatoes and place their pulp in a pan with one pound of salted pork meat, four onions, parsley, one clove, a little pepper, and a quarter pound of good butter
2. Sauté everything
3. Pass through a sieve
4. Add a portion of meat and the crumb of one loaf of bread
5. Let boil for one hour
6. Remove the fat and when ready to serve, pour the broth over bread slices fried in butter

title: Sopa de Pão Dourado (Golden Bread Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread crumb or bread interior
- salt
- black pepper
- water
- two egg yolks
- two spoonfuls of cream

## Directions

1. Put bread in a pot with a little salt, black pepper, and enough water to cover it
2. Let boil for half an hour over coals
3. Add two beaten egg yolks mixed with two spoonfuls of cream
4. Heat a little more and serve

title: Sopa de Pão Frito (Fried Bread Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut bread into slices
2. Coat both sides with butter
3. Sprinkle sugar on top
4. Place in a pan to fry
5. When fried on one side, turn to fry on the other side

title: Sopa de Pêssegos (Peach Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma porção de pêssegos (a portion of peaches)
- amendoas (almonds)
- agua (water)
- vinho branco (white wine)
- assucar (sugar)
- canella (cinnamon)
- cravo da Índia (cloves)
- fatias de pão frito (fried bread slices)

## Directions

1. Descasque-se e descaroce-se uma porção de pêssegos
2. Quebrem-se-lhes os caroços, tirem-se-lhes as amendoas, que se deverão socar
3. Pôr a ferver com os pêssegos em bastante agua até que os pêssegos se desmancem
4. Ajuntem-se-lhes vinho branco, assucar, canella e cravo da Índia
5. Dê-se-lhes mais uma fervura
6. Deite-se em uma sopeira, sobre fatias de pão frito

title: Sopa de Pêssegos Outra (Another Peach Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- pêssegos (peaches)
- fatias de limão gallego (slices of Galician lemon)
- assucar (sugar)
- canella (cinnamon)
- cravo da Índia (cloves)
- sagú (sago)

## Directions

1. Tendo os pêssegos promptos e cozidos
2. Ajuntem-se-lhes fatias de limão gallego, assucar, canella, cravo da Índia e sagú
3. Dê-se-lhes mais uma fervura
4. Sirva-se enquanto quente

title: Sopa de Queijo (Cheese Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- grated cheese
- bread, sliced
- beef stock
- two cups of cream

## Directions

1. Place a layer of grated cheese at the bottom of a tureen
2. Cover with a layer of bread slices
3. Alternate layers of cheese and bread until the tureen is full
4. Pour beef stock mixed with two cups of cream over the top, enough to cover the last layer of bread
5. Place the tureen in the oven
6. Let sit for one hour, adding a little broth from time to time as it dries out

title: Sopa de Rabioli (Ravioli Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds of fatty pork
- water
- fat
- salt
- pepper from India
- clove
- nutmeg
- one pound of wheat flour
- four eggs
- grated cheese
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Take two pounds of fatty pork, chop it very fine, and sauté in a pan containing little water, fat, salt, pepper from India, clove and nutmeg
2. On the other hand, make a dough with one pound of wheat flour and four eggs, which should be stretched on a cloth so as to be very thin
3. Cut round pieces from it, in which wrap a portion of the sautéed meat, thus forming small pastries
4. Put them in water that should already be boiling
5. After ten minutes, remove them and put others until all are cooked
6. Then place them on a serving dish, sprinkle grated cheese on top, and cover with melted butter

title: Sopa de Repolho (Cabbage Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one head of cabbage
- hot water
- slices of beef
- bacon
- one clove
- two carrots
- one large onion
- bread slices

## Directions

1. Blanch one head of cabbage in hot water and let drain
2. Separate its leaves and place them in a pan containing slices of beef covered with bacon, along with one clove, two carrots, and one large onion
3. After cooking, remove the cabbage with the meat slices; place everything in a tureen over sliced bread
4. Strain the broth and pour it into the tureen over the cabbage

title: Sopa de Repolho com Leite (Cabbage and Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- water
- milk
- salt
- bread slices

## Directions

1. Boil a cabbage in water
2. Remove and add boiled milk, salt, and bread slices
3. Let boil a little more and serve

title: Sopa de Repolho de Bruxellas (Brussels Sprout Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- small leaves of Brussels sprouts
- meat broth
- thyme

## Directions

1. Take the small leaves of Brussels sprouts
2. Cook them in meat broth for half an hour
3. Pour this meat broth over toasted bread into which a sprig of thyme has been previously placed

title: Sopa de Sagú (Sago Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of sago
- four bottles of water
- half a bottle of red wine
- four spoonfuls of sugar
- a little cinnamon
- cloves
- nutmeg
- lemon peel
- or half a pound of quince paste dissolved in water instead of sugar
- a quarter of raisins, washed in hot water

## Directions

1. Boil one cup of sago with four bottles of water until reduced to two
2. Add half a bottle of red wine
3. Add four spoonfuls of sugar, a little cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and lemon peel (or half a pound of quince paste dissolved in water instead of sugar)
4. Add a quarter portion of raisins washed in hot water
5. Let it cool slightly from the heat and serve

title: Sopa de Santa Catharina (Saint Catherine's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rye bread
- meat broth
- bread crumbs
- onion

## Directions

1. Cut rye bread into slices, place them in a casserole over coals, adding one tablespoon of meat broth
2. When about to boil, add more tablespoons of broth until the bread absorbs no more
3. Then add bread crumbs and an onion chopped into very fine pieces
4. Finally, when serving, add the desired quantity of meat broth to make the soup

title: Sopa de Tartaruga (Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound turtle meat from the inner shell
- 2 pounds beef
- 2 pounds mutton
- 2 or 3 onions
- pepper
- 6 or 8 cloves
- salt
- sliced cooked meat

## Directions

1. Cut the turtle meat into walnut-sized pieces and wash them
2. Boil the turtle meat for four hours over regular heat
3. In another pot, cook the beef and mutton for six hours in water with onions, pepper, cloves, and salt
4. Strain and skim the broth
5. Pour the strained broth into a tureen over slices of cooked meat
6. Add the turtle meat soup to the tureen and serve

title: Sopa de Tomates (Tomato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- water
- salt
- one onion
- biscuits

## Directions

1. Boil the tomatoes in water and salt until they fall apart
2. Fry an onion in a pan
3. Pour the tomato broth over the fried onion
4. Chop some biscuits and add them to the pan

title: Sopa de Tomates (Tomato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- water
- salt
- onion
- fat
- hardtack or biscuits

## Directions

1. Boil tomatoes in water and salt until they fall apart
2. Pour this broth into a pan in which an onion has been fried
3. Chop some hardtack or biscuits and add to the pan

title: Sopa de Trahiras (Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- small fish
- butter
- wheat flour
- meat broth
- white wine
- valerian
- cardamom
- ginger
- bread slices

## Directions

1. Fry small fish in butter, covered with a little wheat flour
2. Pound them and cook in meat broth
3. After one hour, add white wine in a quantity equal to the broth
4. Add a little valerian, cardamom, and ginger
5. Bring to another boil and pour over bread slices

title: Sopa de Vinho Branco (White Wine Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- white wine
- lemon peel
- cinnamon
- clove
- sugar
- cornstarch

## Directions

1. Bring white wine to boil with lemon peel, cinnamon, clove and sugar
2. When it comes to a boil, add cornstarch dissolved in cold water to thicken it

title: Sopa de Ypiranga (Ypiranga Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one spoon of butter
- four spoons of wheat flour
- one bottle of good beef broth
- half a quarter of peeled almonds reduced to fine powder
- half a quarter of sugar
- a little nutmeg
- one cup of milk cream

## Directions

1. Melt the butter
2. Add four spoons of wheat flour and one bottle of good beef broth
3. At the end add half a quarter of peeled almonds reduced to fine powder, half a quarter of sugar, a little nutmeg and one cup of milk cream
4. Serve hot

title: Sopa de Ypiranga (Ypiranga Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- four spoonfuls of wheat flour
- one bottle of good beef stock

## Directions

1. Melt one spoonful of butter
2. Add four spoonfuls of wheat flour and one bottle of good beef stock

title: Sopa do Frade André (Friar André's Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a bottle of white wine
- half a bottle of white beer
- one bottle of water
- lemon peel
- sugar
- one pound of dried rusks ground
- two egg yolks

## Directions

1. Bring to boil half a bottle of white wine, half a bottle of white beer and one bottle of water with a little lemon peel, sugar and one pound of dried rusks ground
2. Add two beaten egg yolks and let them boil for a little while, then serve

title: Sopa dos Colonos (Colonists' Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage, chopped
- salt
- salt pork
- cornmeal, fried
- potatoes, peeled and sliced
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Boil chopped cabbage with salt and salt pork
2. Strain the broth
3. Add fried cornmeal until cinnamon-colored
4. Add peeled potatoes cut into slices
5. Add lemon juice

title: Sopa Dourada da Boa-Vista (Golden Boa-Vista Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- milk
- four eggs
- four spoonfuls of sugar
- butter
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Cut bread into slices
2. Soak them in milk for five to ten minutes
3. Remove and pass each slice through a mixture of four beaten eggs and four spoonfuls of sugar
4. Fry the coated slices on both sides in butter
5. Serve covered with sugar and ground cinnamon

title: Sopa Dourada de Arroz com Leite (Golden Rice and Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 half pound rice
- water
- salt
- saffron
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook half a pound of rice in water and salt
2. After the water has dried, pour into a bottle of boiling milk
3. Add a little saffron, salt, and sugar
4. Let boil for half an hour and serve

title: Sopa Dourada de Azedas (Golden Sorrel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sorrel
- lettuce plant
- chervil
- fat
- meat broth
- eight egg yolks
- bread

## Directions

1. Make it the same way as sorrel soup
2. But before pouring the soup over the bread, thicken the broth with eight beaten egg yolks in a portion of cold broth
3. Give it another boil and pour over toasted bread

title: Sopa Dourada de Azedas (Golden Sorrel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a portion of sorrel
- one head of lettuce
- a little chervil, finely chopped
- a little fat
- a portion of meat broth
- eight egg yolks
- a portion of cold broth

## Directions

1. Prepare the same way as sorrel soup
2. Before pouring the soup over the bread, thicken the broth with eight beaten egg yolks mixed in a cup of cold broth
3. Bring to a boil once more
4. Pour over toasted bread slices

title: Sopa estomacal (Stomach Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef meat and bones
- salt
- onion
- Indian pepper
- nutmeg
- small potatoes
- cloves

## Directions

1. Make a broth of beef meat and bones
2. Add a little salt, onion, Indian pepper and nutmeg
3. Remove the foam from time to time
4. When everything is cooked, add some peeled small potatoes
5. Once these are cooked, add some cloves
6. Give it one final boil
7. Serve

title: Sopa Fria (Cold Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- grated bread crust
- half a pound of sugar
- lemon peel
- two or three slices of Galician lemon
- a little nutmeg grated
- one bottle of red wine
- two bottles of water

## Directions

1. Put in a tureen grated bread crust, half a pound of sugar, lemon peel, two or three slices of Galician lemon, a little grated nutmeg and one bottle of red wine with two bottles of water
2. Serve as is

title: Sopa Fria de Cerveja (Cold Beer Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- grated bread crust
- sugar
- lemon peel
- slices of Galician lemon
- raisins
- half beer
- half water
- white wine

## Directions

1. Make as the cold soup, adding more raisins, and replacing water with half beer and half water, and replacing red wine with white wine

title: Sopa Italiana (Italian Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds mutton
- 1/2 pound bacon
- 6 jars water
- 1/2 jar white wine
- 1 glass vinegar
- cloves
- cinnamon
- pepper from India
- 1 spoon butter
- sugar
- 6 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook 2 pounds of mutton and half a pound of bacon in 6 jars of water
2. Add half a jar of white wine, a glass of vinegar, cloves, and a little cinnamon
3. When everything is cooked, strain it
4. Add a little pepper from India, a spoon of butter, a little sugar, and half a dozen beaten egg yolks

title: Sopa Juliana (Julienne Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- turnips
- onions
- cabbage
- sorrel
- butter
- peas
- green beans
- parsley leaves
- salt
- water
- fine cornmeal or wheat flour
- beef butter

## Directions

1. Cut carrots, turnips, onions, cabbage, and sorrel into fine long strips
2. Place on the fire with a little butter and sauté
3. Add peas, green beans, parsley leaves, necessary salt, and a little water
4. Let boil until everything is well cooked
5. Add fine cornmeal or wheat flour fried in beef butter, diluted in sufficient water to make soup
6. Give it another boil and send to the table
7. Note: it can also be made without wheat flour or cornmeal, which is actually better

title: Sopa Magna ou Sergipana (Magna or Sergipan Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a handful of vegetables (greens or cabbage)
- carrots
- parsley root
- celery root
- potatoes
- salt
- bread crust
- turtle egg fat for frying

## Directions

1. Put a handful of vegetables (greens or cabbage), carrots, parsley root, celery root, potatoes and salt on the fire to cook
2. Boil for a long time
3. Strain the broth over bread crust that has been fried in turtle egg fat

title: Sopa Magna ou Sergipana (Magna or Sergipana Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- vegetables
- cabbage or kale
- carrots
- parsley root
- celery root
- potatoes
- salt
- bread crust
- fat
- turtle egg fat

## Directions

1. Put a handful of vegetables (cabbage or kale, carrots, parsley root, celery root, potatoes) and salt on the fire
2. Boil for a long time
3. Strain the broth over bread crust fried in turtle egg fat

title: Sopa para purificar o sangue (Soup to Purify the Blood)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- watercress
- chicory
- lettuce
- sugar
- bitter almonds
- toasted bread

## Directions

1. Cook a hand of watercress, chicory and lettuce in beef broth
2. After half an hour, strain the broth
3. Add a little sugar and half a dozen crushed bitter almonds
4. Give it one more boil
5. Pour over toasted bread

title: Sopa Parda (Dark Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one hen
- its own blood
- two egg yolks
- four tablespoons of vinegar
- two tablespoons of sugar
- one tablespoon of cornstarch
- two cups of cold water

## Directions

1. Cook a hen as for soup
2. After seasoning, add the hen's own blood and two egg yolks dissolved in four tablespoons of vinegar, two tablespoons of sugar and one tablespoon of cornstarch also dissolved in two cups of cold water
3. Serve with corn porridge

title: Sopa peitoral (Pectoral Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- cow's hand
- water
- raisins
- honey
- fennel herb
- milk
- eggs

## Directions

1. Boil a cow's hand with plenty of water until cooked
2. Strain the broth
3. Add half a pound of raisins, six spoonfuls of honey and a little fennel herb to the broth
4. Let it boil until reduced to two bottles
5. Mix in a bottle of milk and three beaten eggs
6. Give it one more boil
7. Serve

title: Sopa Polaca (Polish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one hen, one duck or one mallard
- half a pound of chopped lard, already fried
- water
- salt
- seasonings
- four hard-boiled eggs
- wheat flour
- eggs

## Directions

1. Cut the hen, duck or mallard into small pieces and sauté in half a pound of chopped lard already fried
2. Add a little water, salt and necessary seasonings, and continue sautéing for more time
3. When cooked, let cool to remove the bones
4. Chop the meat into even finer pieces and add four hard-boiled eggs, making a kind of filling
5. On the other hand, make a dough of wheat flour and eggs, which should be stretched until very thin
6. Cut it into strips, and placing at intervals small pieces of chopped meat, cover them with the other strips of dough, pressing down the places where there is no meat, thus forming small pastries that are separated so they can retain the meat they contain
7. Boil them one after another in pure beef broth
8. Serve mixed with the broth

title: Sopa Restaurante (Restorative Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sago
- lemon peel
- cinnamon
- slices of Galician lemon
- red wine
- dried plums

## Directions

1. Boil sago with lemon peel, cinnamon and slices of Galician lemon
2. When everything is cooked, add some cups of red wine and some dried plums
3. Let this mixture boil a little longer, then serve

title: Sopa tonica para convalescentes (Tonic Soup for Convalescents)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef leg with bones
- mutton
- hen
- water
- small potatoes
- chicory root
- carrots
- nutmeg
- salt
- toasted bread
- rice
- pasta

## Directions

1. Boil for four hours two pounds of beef leg with bones, one pound of mutton and one hen in eight bottles of water, always removing the foam
2. Add small potatoes, chicory root, carrots, a little nutmeg and salt
3. Once everything is cooked and cold, remove the fat and strain
4. Add the broth
5. Pour over toasted bread, rice cooked in water and salt, or pasta

title: Sopa Veneziana (Venetian Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- beef broth
- grated cheese
- sugar
- cinnamon
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Cook a portion of rice with little water and little salt on moderate heat
2. When cooked, add a portion of beef broth and let it boil until dry
3. When in this state, place on a serving dish and cover with a layer of grated cheese, sugar and cinnamon, pouring melted butter over everything

title: Sopas de Legumes e Hervas (Vegetable and Herb Soups)
body:
## Ingredients

- uma colher de gordura (a spoon of fat)
- tres chicaras de arroz escolhido e lavado (three cups of selected and washed rice)
- agua (water)
- sal (salt)
- salsa (parsley)
- algumas folhas de cebola (some onion leaves)
- uns grãos de pimenta da Índia (some grains of Indian pepper)

## Directions

1. Deite-se uma colher de gordura em uma panella
2. Ferva-se ao calor de fogo vivo até não chiar mais
3. Ajuntem-se-lhe depois tres chicaras de arroz escolhido e lavado
4. Deixe-se frigir pelo espaço de cinco minutos
5. Deitando-se-lhe em seguida duas garrafas de agua, sal, salsa, algumas folhas de cebola e uns grãos de pimenta da Índia
6. Tendo fervido por um pouco, deve-se tirar do fogo e se pôr sobre umas brazas para engrossar

title: Sopas de Sobejos (Leftover Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted and fried meats from the previous day
- hard bread, grated
- egg yolks
- broth from the cooking of the meats
- seasonings

## Directions

1. Cook the roasted and fried meats that remain from the day before
2. When well cooked, remove from the pan, pound and mix with hard grated bread and some egg yolks
3. Form balls from this mixture and place them in a tureen
4. Pour over them the broth remaining from cooking the meats, after adding the necessary seasonings

title: Sorrel Sauce (Molho de Azedas)
body:
## Ingredients

- bunches of sorrel
- butter
- beef broth
- salt
- nutmeg
- sugar
- egg yolks
- polvilho (starch)

## Directions

1. Take some bunches of sorrel, chop them into small pieces, and place them over coals in a covered casserole, letting them boil a little in their own water; then add a little butter, a little beef broth, salt, nutmeg and sugar; let it boil for half an hour, and thicken with some egg yolks and a little polvilho; serve with cooked, roasted fish and boiled beef.

title: Sorubim Assado no Espeto (Roasted Sorubim on a Spit)
body:
## Ingredients

- one fish
- thin strips of lard
- salt
- cassava flour
- lard
- lemon juice
- one glass of vinegar
- one egg yolk
- mustard sauce

## Directions

1. Remove the entrails and wash the fish
2. Lard it with thin strips of lard and rub with salt
3. Thread onto a spit and roast over moderate fire, moistening with lard and lemon juice
4. When cooked, dust with cassava flour, moisten with broth and turn on the spit a few more times
5. Serve after adding one glass of vinegar, one egg yolk and a little mustard sauce

title: Sorubim Ensopado (Stewed Sorubim)
body:
## Ingredients

- postas of sorubim fish
- water
- salt
- parsley
- marjoram
- pepper
- three egg yolks
- one chicara of lemon juice
- two tablespoons of manioc flour
- one tablespoon of fat

## Directions

1. Take some steaks of the fish, wash them, and boil them in water, salt, parsley, marjoram and pepper
2. Once cooked, remove the broth, and mix three beaten egg yolks with one chicara of lemon juice, two tablespoons of manioc flour and one tablespoon of fat
3. Boil until it reduces to five or six chicaras of an incorporated sauce, pour the fish inside, heat and serve

title: Sorubim Ensopado (Stewed Sorubim)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish steaks
- water
- salt
- parsley
- marjoram
- pepper
- three egg yolks
- one cup of lemon juice
- two tablespoons of cassava flour
- one tablespoon of lard

## Directions

1. Take fish steaks, wash and boil in water with salt, parsley, marjoram and pepper
2. When cooked, remove the broth and mix three beaten egg yolks with one cup of lemon juice, two tablespoons of cassava flour and one tablespoon of lard
3. Boil until reduced to five or six cups of incorporated sauce, add the fish, heat and serve

title: Sorubim Frito (Fried Sorubim)
body:
## Ingredients

- postas of sorubim the thickness of a finger
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- fat
- lemon

## Directions

1. Take some steaks of sorubim the thickness of a finger
2. Sprinkle on both sides with salt, pepper and mustard
3. Fry in fat, and once fried, place on a plate, pouring over each steak a slice of peeled lemon, and squeezing a little lemon juice
4. Put a little hot fat and serve

title: Sorubim Guisado (Stewed Sorubim)
body:
## Ingredients

- loins of sorubim
- wheat flour or cangica cornmeal
- two tablespoons of fat
- carapicus
- half a dozen artichoke hearts
- parsley
- onion leaves
- thyme
- one chicara of meat broth
- salt
- pepper
- lemon or sour land orange juice

## Directions

1. Cut the loins of sorubim into pieces
2. Wrap these in wheat flour or cangica cornmeal
3. Sauté in two tablespoons of fat until they take on a copper color
4. Place in a casserole a portion of carapicus and half a dozen artichoke hearts, parsley, onion leaves and thyme
5. Add one chicara of meat broth, salt, pepper and the fish with the sauce
6. Let boil for half an hour over moderate heat
7. Once cooked, pour onto a plate with lemon or sour land orange juice and serve

title: Sorubim Guisado com Leite (Sorubim Stewed with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- loins of sorubim
- wheat flour or cangica cornmeal
- two tablespoons of fat
- carapicus
- two chicaras of milk

## Directions

1. Cut the loins of sorubim into strips
2. Wrap them in wheat flour or cangica cornmeal, and sauté in two tablespoons of fat
3. Boil a portion of carapicus in two chicaras of milk, add the fried fish, and let everything boil together for half an hour over moderate heat, and serve

title: Soã Assada em Môlho à Robert (Roasted Loin with Robert Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork loin
- Sweet oil
- Salt
- Meat substance
- Robert sauce

## Directions

1. Trim the pork loin as one would trim a veal shoulder for roasting
2. Two hours before serving, cover it with paper coated in sweet oil and roast on a grill over gentle heat
3. Half an hour before serving, remove the paper and sprinkle salt on top and bottom
4. Allow it to brown, place on a serving platter with Robert sauce prepared beforehand
5. Place meat substance over the loin two or three times

title: Soã Ensopada (Braised Loin)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork loin
- Fat
- Water
- Salt
- Garlic
- Cayenne pepper
- Comarim peppers
- Parsley
- Onions
- Tomatoes
- Cornmeal mush

## Directions

1. Cut the loin into pieces
2. Braise these in a little fat
3. Add a little water, salt, garlic, cayenne pepper, comarim peppers, parsley, onions and tomatoes, all finely chopped
4. Allow to cook until reduced to little broth
5. Serve with cornmeal mush

title: Soã Ensopada com Couves Picadas à Mineira (Braised Loin with Chopped Cabbage, Minas Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork loin
- Salt
- Garlic
- Cabbage
- Comarim peppers
- Watercress leaves

## Directions

1. Cut the loin into pieces
2. Season with salt and garlic
3. Fry the pieces
4. Add finely chopped cabbage and comarim peppers
5. Serve
6. Alternatively, finely chopped watercress leaves may be used instead of cabbage

title: Soã Ensopada com Palmitos e Quiabos (Braised Loin with Heart of Palm and Okra)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork loin
- Heart of palm
- Okra
- Ora-pro-nobis leaves
- Comarim peppers
- Salt
- Garlic
- Onion leaves
- Cornmeal mush

## Directions

1. Braise the loin
2. Chop the heart of palm finely and add with the loin
3. Allow to cook together
4. Add okra or, if lacking, ora-pro-nobis leaves, comarim peppers, salt, garlic and chopped onion leaves
5. Allow to cook a few more minutes and serve with cornmeal mush

title: Spanish Sauce (Molho Hespanhol)
body:
## Ingredients

- fat
- beef, cut into small pieces
- onion
- carrot
- clove
- wheat flour or corn meal
- water
- parsley

## Directions
